Luke13:1 Na rĩrĩ, nĩ kwarĩ na andũ amwe maarĩ ho hĩndĩ ĩyo, arĩa meerire Jesũ ũhoro wa andũ a Galili arĩa mooragĩtwo nĩ Pilato makĩruta magongona, nayo thakame yao igĩtukana na ya nyamũ cia magongona mao." 
Luke13:2 Nake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Anga mũgwĩciiria atĩ andũ acio maanyariirirwo ũguo tondũ acio maarĩ ehia gũkĩra andũ acio angĩ othe a Galili?" 
Luke13:3 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ, aca! No rĩrĩ, mwaga kwĩrira, o na inyuĩ inyuothe mũkaniinwo o tao." 
Luke13:4 Kana andũ arĩa ikũmi na anana, arĩa magwĩrĩirwo nĩ nyũmba ĩrĩa ndaaya kũu itũũra rĩa Siloamu ĩkĩmooraga-rĩ, anga mũgwĩciiria atĩ maarĩ na mahĩtia maingĩ gũkĩra andũ arĩa angĩ othe maatũũraga kũu Jerusalemu?" 
Luke13:5 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ, aca! No rĩrĩ, mwaga kwĩrira, o na inyuĩ inyuothe mũkaaniinwo o tao.”" 
Luke13:6 Agĩcooka akĩmaarĩria na ngerekano, akiuga atĩrĩ, “Mũndũ ũmwe aarĩ na mũkũyũ wahandĩtwo thĩinĩ wa mũgũnda wake wa mĩthabibũ, nake agĩthiĩ gũcaria maciaro mũtĩ-inĩ ũcio, no ndaigana kuona ngũyũ o na ĩmwe." 
Luke13:7 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio, akĩĩra mũruti wa wĩra wa mũgũnda ũcio wa mĩthabibũ atĩrĩ, ‘Rĩu nĩ mĩaka ĩtatũ njũkaga gũcaria maciaro mũkũyũ-inĩ, ũyũ na ndirĩ ndoona ngũyũ o na ĩmwe. Ũteme! Ũũthũkagĩria mũgũnda nĩkĩ?’" 
Luke13:8 “No mũndũ ũcio akĩmũcookeria, akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Mwathi ũyũ, nĩtũreke ũikare mwaka ũngĩ ũmwe, ndĩũrĩmĩre na ndĩwĩkĩre thumu." 
Luke13:9 Naguo ũngĩciara hĩndĩ ĩyo, nĩ wega! No ũngĩaga gũciara, no ũtemwo.’ ”" 
Luke13:10 Na rĩrĩ, mũthenya ũmwe wa Thabatũ, Jesũ nĩkũrutana aarutanaga thĩinĩ wa thunagogi ĩmwe," 
Luke13:11 nakuo gũgĩkorwo nĩ kwarĩ na mũtumia wonjetio nĩ ngoma thũku mĩaka ikũmi na ĩnana. Atũire ainamĩrĩire atekũhota gwĩtiira o na hanini. 
Luke13:12 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Jesũ aamuonire, akĩmwĩta, akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Mũtumia ũyũ nĩwohorwo kuuma kũrĩ wonje waku.”" 
Luke13:13 Agĩcooka akĩmũigĩrĩra moko, na kahinda o kau agĩĩtiira, na akĩgooca Ngai." 
Luke13:14 Nake mũnene wa thunagogi akĩrakara mũno nĩ ũndũ wa Jesũ kũhonania mũthenya wa Thabatũ. Nake akĩĩra andũ atĩrĩ, “He na mĩthenya ĩtandatũ ya kũruta wĩra. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio, ũkagai kũhonio mĩthenya ĩyo, no ti mũthenya wa Thabatũ.”" 
Luke13:15 Nowe Mwathani akĩmũcookeria, akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Inyuĩ hinga ici! Githĩ o mũndũ wanyu ndohoraga ndegwa yake kana ndigiri yake yume kiugũ mũthenya wa Thabatũ, amĩtware ĩthiĩ ĩkanyue maaĩ?" 
Luke13:16 Nake mũtumia ũyũ mwarĩ wa Iburahĩmu, ũrĩa ũtũire ohetwo nĩ Shaitani mĩaka ikũmi na ĩnana; ndakĩagĩrĩrwo nĩ kuohorwo o na kũrĩ mũthenya wa Thabatũ?”" 
Luke13:17 Rĩrĩa oigire ũguo, thũ ciake ciothe igĩconoka, no kĩrĩndĩ kĩu kĩa andũ gĩgĩkena nĩ ũndũ wa maũndũ ma magegania marĩa eekaga." 
Luke13:18 Ningĩ Jesũ akĩũria atĩrĩ, “Ũthamaki wa Ngai ũhaanaine na kĩ? Na ngũũgerekania na kĩĩ?" 
Luke13:19 Ũhaana ta mbeũ ya karatarĩ ĩrĩa mũndũ oire akĩhaanda mũgũnda wake. Igĩkũra ĩgĩtuĩka mũtĩ, nacio nyoni cia rĩera-inĩ igĩũka igĩaka itara honge-inĩ ciaguo.”" 
Luke13:20 Ningĩ akĩũria atĩrĩ, “Ingĩgerekania ũthamaki wa Ngai na kĩĩ?" 
Luke13:21 Ũhaana ta ndawa ya kũimbia mĩgate ĩrĩa mũndũ-wa-nja ooire na akĩmĩtukania na mũtu mũingĩ, o nginya wothe ũkĩimba.”" 
Luke13:22 Nake Jesũ agĩthiĩ ahĩtũkĩire matũũra-inĩ na tũtũũra-inĩ akĩrutanaga erekeire Jerusalemu. 
Luke13:23 Nake mũndũ ũmwe akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Mwathani anga no andũ anini tu makahonokio?” Nake akĩmeera atĩrĩ," 
Luke13:24 “Geragiai na hinya gũtoonyera mũrango ũrĩa mũceke; tondũ ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ, andũ aingĩ nĩ makaageria gũtoonya, no matikahota." 
Luke13:25 Rĩrĩa mwene nyũmba agaakorwo okĩrĩte na ahinge mũrango-rĩ, mũkaarũgama hau nja mũkĩringaringaga mũrango mũkĩmũthaithaga, mũkoiga atĩrĩ, ‘Mwathi witũ, tũhingũrĩre mũrango.’ “Nake nĩakamũcookeria amwĩre atĩrĩ, ‘Niĩ ndimũũĩ o na ndiũĩ kũrĩa muumĩte.’" 
Luke13:26 “Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩmũkoiga atĩrĩ, ‘Nĩtwarĩĩanagĩra na tũkanyuuanĩra nawe, o na nĩwarutanaga njĩra-inĩ cia matũũra maitũ.’" 
Luke13:27 “Nowe nĩakamacookeria atĩrĩ, ‘Niĩ ndimũũĩ, o na ndiũĩ kũrĩa muumĩte. Njehererai, inyuĩ inyuothe mwĩkaga ũũru!’" 
Luke13:28 “Kũu nĩgũkagĩa na kĩrĩro, na kũhagarania magego, rĩrĩa mũkoona Iburahĩmu, na Isaaka, na Jakubu, na anabii othe marĩ ũthamaki-inĩ wa Ngai, no inyuĩ mũkorwo mũikĩtio nja." 
Luke13:29 Nao andũ nĩmagooka kuuma mwena wa irathĩro, na wa ithũĩro, na wa gathigathini, na wa gũthini, maikare thĩ iruga-inĩ kũu ũthamaki-inĩ wa Ngai." 
Luke13:30 No ti-itherũ, nĩ kũrĩ andũ marĩ thuutha magaatuĩka a mbere, na nĩ kũrĩ a mbere magaatuĩka a thuutha.”" 
Luke13:31 O hĩndĩ ĩyo Afarisai amwe magĩũka kũrĩ Jesũ makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Uma gũkũ ũthiĩ kũndũ kũngĩ. Herode nĩarenda gũkũũragithia.”" 
Luke13:32 Nake agĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Thiĩi mũkeere mbwe ĩyo atĩrĩ, ‘Ũmũthĩ na rũciũ ngũkorwo ngĩingata ndaimono na ngĩhonia andũ, na mũthenya wa ĩtatũ ndĩĩkie wĩra wakwa.’" 
Luke13:33 O na kũrĩ ũguo, ũmũthĩ na rũciũ o na oke no nginya ngorwo ngĩthiĩ o na mbere, nĩgũkorwo ti-itherũ gũtirĩ mũnabii ũngĩkuĩra nja ya Jerusalemu!" 
Luke13:34 “Atĩrĩrĩ, wee Jerusalemu, Jerusalemu, wee ũragaga anabii, na ũkahũũra na mahiga nyuguto arĩa matũmĩtwo kũrĩ we, nĩ maita maingĩ atĩa ndanenda gũcookanĩrĩria ciana ciaku hamwe o ta ũrĩa ngũkũ ĩcookanagĩrĩria tũcui twayo mathagu-inĩ mayo, no ndũnjĩtĩkagĩria!" 
Luke13:35 Atĩrĩrĩ, nyũmba yaku ĩiyũrĩte ihooru. Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ, mũtikanyona rĩngĩ o nginya rĩrĩa mũkoiga atĩrĩ, ‘Kũrathimwo nĩ mũndũ ũrĩa ũgũũka na rĩĩtwa rĩa Mwathani.’ ”" 
Luke14:1 Na rĩrĩ, mũthenya ũmwe wa Thabatũ, Jesũ nĩathiire kũrĩa irio nyũmba ya mũnene ũmwe wa Afarisai, nao andũ maikarĩte mamũrorete mũno." 
Luke14:2 Na hau mbere yake nĩ haarĩ na mũndũ warũarĩte mũrimũ wa kũimba mwĩrĩ. 
Luke14:3 Jesũ akĩũria Afarisai na arutani a watho atĩrĩ, “Watho nĩwĩtĩkĩrĩtie kũhonania mũthenya wa Thabatũ, kana ndwĩtĩkĩrĩtie?”" 
Luke14:4 No-o magĩkira ki. Nake akĩnyiita mũndũ ũcio, akĩmũhonia na akĩmwĩra athiĩ." 
Luke14:5 Agĩcooka akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Nũũ wanyu ũngĩaga kũruta mũriũ irima, kana ndegwa yake ĩgwĩte irima rĩa maaĩ mũthenya wa Thabatũ?”" 
Luke14:6 Nao makĩaga ũndũ wa kũmũcookeria. 
Luke14:7 Rĩrĩa Jesũ oonire ũrĩa ageni maathuuraga itĩ iria ciaikaragĩrwo nĩ ageni a gũtĩĩo maikarĩre cio-rĩ, akĩmahe ngerekano ĩno, akiuga atĩrĩ:" 
Luke14:8 “Mũndũ angĩgwĩta iruga-inĩ rĩa kĩhikanio-rĩ, ndũgaikarĩre itĩ iria ciigĩirwo ageni a gũtĩĩo, tondũ no hakorwo mũndũ ũngĩ mũtĩĩe gũgũkĩra wĩtĩtwo nĩ mwene iruga." 
Luke14:9 Kũngĩkĩhaana ũguo-rĩ, mwene iruga ũrĩa ũmwĩtĩte inyuĩ eerĩ no ooke, akwĩre atĩrĩ, ‘Eherera mũndũ ũyũ gĩtĩ kĩu.’ Hĩndĩ ĩyo, nĩũgaaikara thuutha biũ ũconokete." 
Luke14:10 No hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ũngĩtwo-rĩ, ikaragĩra itĩ cia thuutha, nĩgeetha ũrĩa ũgwĩtĩte ooka, akwĩre atĩrĩ, ‘Mũrata wakwa, thiĩ ũgaikare harĩa mbere.’ Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩũkaheo gĩtĩĩo maitho-inĩ ma ageni arĩa angĩ othe." 
Luke14:11 Nĩgũkorwo mũndũ ũrĩa wothe wĩtũgagĩria nĩakanyiihio, na ũrĩa wothe wĩnyiihagia nĩagatũũgĩrio.”" 
Luke14:12 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩĩra mũndũ ũcio wamwĩtĩte atĩrĩ, “Waruga iruga rĩa mũthenya kana rĩa hwaĩ-inĩ-rĩ, ndũgetage o arata aku kana ariũ a thoguo, kana andũ anyu, o na kana andũ arĩa atongu a itũũra rĩanyu; ũngĩka ũguo-rĩ, nao nĩmagagwĩta na nĩ ũndũ ũcio makũrĩhe ũguo ũmekĩte." 
Luke14:13 No hĩndĩ ĩrĩa waruga iruga ĩtaga athĩĩni, na cionje, na ithua, na atumumu," 
Luke14:14 nawe nĩũkarathimwo. O na gũtuĩka matingĩhota gũkũrĩha, nĩũkarĩhwo hĩndĩ ĩrĩa andũ arĩa athingu makaariũkio.”" 
Luke14:15 Na rĩrĩa mũndũ ũmwe wa arĩa maikarĩte metha-inĩ hamwe nake aiguire ũguo, akĩĩra Jesũ atĩrĩ, “Kũrathimwo-rĩ, nĩ mũndũ ũrĩa ũkaarĩa irio iruga-inĩ rĩa ũthamaki wa Ngai.”" 
Luke14:16 Nake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Mũndũ ũmwe nĩahaarĩirie iruga inene na agĩĩta ageni aingĩ." 
Luke14:17 Nacio thaa cia kũrĩa ciakinya, agĩtũma ndungata yake ĩkeere andũ arĩa meetĩtwo atĩrĩ, ‘Ũkai, nĩgũkorwo maũndũ mothe nĩmahaarĩrie.’" 
Luke14:18 “Nao othe, o mũndũ akĩambĩrĩria kũheana ciĩgwatio. Wa mbere akiuga atĩrĩ, ‘No hĩndĩ ndĩragũrire mũgũnda na no nginya thiĩ ngawone. Thiĩ ũmwĩre andekere.’" 
Luke14:19 “Ũrĩa ũngĩ akiuga atĩrĩ, ‘No hĩndĩ ndĩragũrire ndegwa ikũmi cia kũrĩma, na nĩndĩrathiĩ gũcigeria. Thiĩ ũmwĩre andekere.’" 
Luke14:20 “Nake ũngĩ akiuga atĩrĩ, ‘No hĩndĩ ndĩrahikanirie, nĩ ũndũ ũcio ndiihota gũũka.’" 
Luke14:21 “Ndungata ĩyo ĩgĩthiĩ, ĩkĩmenyithia mwathi wayo ũhoro ũcio. Hĩndĩ ĩyo mwene mũciĩ akĩrakara na agĩatha ndungata ĩyo akĩmĩĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Umagara narua ũthiĩ njĩra-inĩ iria nene, o na tũcĩra-inĩ twa itũũra, ũrehe athĩĩni, na cionje, na arĩa atumumu, o na ithua.’" 
Luke14:22 “Nayo ndungata ĩyo ĩkiuga atĩrĩ, ‘Mwathi wakwa, ũrĩa wathanire nĩwĩkĩtwo, na no hatigaire handũ.’" 
Luke14:23 “Hĩndĩ ĩyo Mwathi wayo akĩĩra ndungata ĩyo atĩrĩ, ‘Umagara ũthiĩ rĩu njĩra-inĩ na ndeere-inĩ cia mĩgũnda, ũkaringĩrĩrie andũ moke nĩgeetha nyũmba yakwa ĩiyũre." 
Luke14:24 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ, gũtirĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe wa acio metĩtwo ũgaacama iruga rĩakwa.’ ”" 
Luke14:25 Na rĩrĩ, andũ aingĩ nĩmatwaranire na Jesũ, nake akĩmahũgũkĩra, akĩmeera atĩrĩ," 
Luke14:26 “Mũndũ o wothe angĩũka kũrĩ niĩ na aage gũthũũra ithe na nyina, na mũtumia wake, na ciana ciake, na ariũ a nyina, na aarĩ a nyina, o na muoyo wake we mwene-rĩ, ndangĩhota gũtuĩka mũrutwo wakwa." 
Luke14:27 Nake mũndũ o wothe ũtegwĩkuuĩra mũtĩ wake wa kwambĩrwo anũmĩrĩre, ndangĩhota gũtuĩka mũrutwo wakwa." 
Luke14:28 “Atĩrĩrĩ, mũndũ ũmwe wanyu angĩenda gwaka nyũmba ndaaya na igũrũ-rĩ, githĩ ndangĩamba gũikara thĩ atare thogora nĩguo one kana wĩra na mbeeca cia kũmĩrĩkia?" 
Luke14:29 Nĩgũkorwo angĩremwo nĩ kũmĩrĩkia thuutha wa gwaka mũthingi, andũ arĩa othe marĩmĩonaga nĩmarĩmũthekagĩrĩra," 
Luke14:30 makoiga atĩrĩ, ‘Mũndũ ũyũ aambĩrĩirie gwaka nyũmba akĩremwo nĩ kũmĩrĩkia.’" 
Luke14:31 “Kana mũthamaki angĩkorwo akiriĩ gũthiĩ kũrũa mbaara na mũthamaki ũngĩ-rĩ, githĩ ndangĩamba gũikara thĩ ecũũranie kana ahota kũrũa arĩ na andũ ngiri ikũmi na mũthamaki ũrĩa ũroka kũmũũkĩrĩra arĩ na andũ ngiri mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ?" 
Luke14:32 Angĩona atĩ ndangĩhota kũmũtooria, angĩtũmĩra mũthamaki ũcio ũngĩ andũ arĩ o kũraya mathiĩ makamũũrie kũgĩe na thayũ." 
Luke14:33 Ũguo noguo, mũndũ o wothe wanyu angĩaga kũrekia indo ciothe iria arĩ nacio, ndangĩtuĩka mũrutwo wakwa." 
Luke14:34 “Na rĩrĩ, cumbĩ nĩ mwega, no cumbĩ ũngĩkorwo nĩũthirĩte mũcamo waguo-rĩ, ũngĩcooka gũcamithio ta cumbĩ na kĩ?" 
Luke14:35 Cumbĩ ũcio ndũrĩ bata gũitwo tĩĩri-inĩ o na kana gũitwo kĩara-inĩ, nĩgũteeo ũteagwo. “Ũrĩa ũrĩ na matũ ma kũigua, nĩakĩigue.”" 
Luke15:1 Na rĩrĩ, etia mbeeca cia igooti na “ehia” othe nĩmoonganaga harĩ we nĩguo mamũigue." 
Luke15:2 No Afarisai na arutani a watho magĩteta makiuga atĩrĩ, “Mũndũ ũyũ nĩamũkagĩra ehia na akarĩĩanĩra nao.”" 
Luke15:3 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jesũ akĩmahe ngerekano ĩno akĩmeera atĩrĩ: 
Luke15:4 “Mũndũ ũmwe wanyu angĩkorwo na ngʼondu igana rĩmwe, na ĩmwe yacio yũre-rĩ, githĩ ndatigaga icio mĩrongo kenda na kenda kũu werũ-inĩ, athiĩ agacarie ĩyo ĩmwe yũrĩte, nginya amĩone?" 
Luke15:5 Na aarĩkia kũmĩona, akamĩigĩrĩra ciande ciake akenete," 
Luke15:6 akainũka mũciĩ. Agacooka ageeta arata ake na andũ a itũũra hamwe, akameera atĩrĩ, ‘Ũkai tũkenanĩre nĩ ũndũ nĩnyonete ngʼondu yakwa ĩrĩa ĩrorĩte.’" 
Luke15:7 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ, ũguo noguo kũgĩaga gĩkeno kĩnene igũrũ nĩ ũndũ wa mũndũ ũmwe mwĩhia wĩrirĩte, gũkĩra ũrĩa gũkenagwo nĩ ũndũ wa andũ mĩrongo kenda na kenda athingu arĩa matabatarĩtio nĩ kwĩrira." 
Luke15:8 “Kana mũtumia angĩkorwo arĩ na icunjĩ ikũmi cia betha, ĩmwe yacio yũre-rĩ, githĩ ndagwatagia tawa, akahaata nyũmba yothe, na akamĩcaria na kĩyo o nginya amĩone?" 
Luke15:9 Na amĩona-rĩ, ageeta arata ake o na andũ a itũũra hamwe, akameera atĩrĩ, ‘Ũkai tũkenanĩre tondũ nĩnyonete mbeeca yakwa ĩrĩa ĩrorĩte.’" 
Luke15:10 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ, ũguo noguo gũkoragwo na gĩkeno harĩ araika a Ngai nĩ ũndũ wa mwĩhia ũmwe wĩrirĩte.”" 
Luke15:11 Jesũ agĩthiĩ na mbere akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Nĩ kwarĩ na mũndũ ũmwe warĩ na ariũ eerĩ." 
Luke15:12 Ũrĩa mũnini akĩĩra ithe atĩrĩ, ‘Baba ngaĩra igai rĩrĩa rĩngĩgatuĩka rĩakwa.’ Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ithe akĩmagayania indo ciake." 
Luke15:13 “Na matukũ manini mathira, mũriũ ũcio mũnini agĩcookanĩrĩria indo ciake ciothe, akiumagara agĩthiĩ bũrũri warĩ kũraya, na arĩ kũu agĩitanga indo ciake na mũtũũrĩre wa ũmaramari." 
Luke15:14 Nake aarĩkia kũhũthĩra indo ciake ciothe, gũkĩgĩa na ngʼaragu nene kũu bũrũri ũcio wothe, nake akĩambĩrĩria gũthĩĩnĩka." 
Luke15:15 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio agĩthiĩ kũũria wĩra kũrĩ mũndũ ũmwe wa bũrũri ũcio, nake akĩmũtwara akarĩithagie ngũrwe gĩthaka-inĩ gĩake." 
Luke15:16 Nĩeriragĩria kwĩhũũnia na makoro marĩa maarĩĩagwo nĩ ngũrwe icio tondũ gũtirĩ mũndũ wamũheaga kĩndũ gĩa kũrĩa. 
Luke15:17 “Na rĩrĩa ecookerire, akiuga atĩrĩ, ‘Nĩ ndungata ciigana atĩa cia baba irĩ na irio cia gũciigana o na igatigara, na niĩ nguagĩre gũkũ nĩ ngʼaragu!" 
Luke15:18 Nĩngũũkĩra thiĩ kũrĩ baba ngamwĩre atĩrĩ: Baba, nĩnjĩhĩirie Ngai na ngakwĩhĩria." 
Luke15:19 Ndĩagĩrĩirwo nĩgũcooka gwĩtagwo mũrũguo rĩngĩ; ndua ta ndungata ĩmwe yaku.’ 
Luke15:20 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio agĩũkĩra, agĩthiĩ kũrĩ ithe. “No arĩ o haraaya, ithe akĩmuona, nake akĩringwo nĩ tha nĩ ũndũ wake; agĩtengʼera kũrĩ mũrũwe, akĩmũhĩmbĩria na akĩmũmumunya." 
Luke15:21 “Nake mũriũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Baba, nĩnjĩhĩirie Ngai o na ngakwĩhĩria. Ndiagĩrĩirwo nĩgũcooka gwĩtagwo mũrũguo rĩngĩ.’" 
Luke15:22 “No ithe akĩĩra ndungata ciake atĩrĩ, ‘Thiĩi narua mũrehe nguo ĩrĩa njega mũno mũmũhumbe, na mũmwĩkĩre gĩcũhĩ kĩara, na iraatũ magũrũ." 
Luke15:23 Ningĩ mũrehe njaũ ya gĩcegũ ĩrĩa noru mũmĩthĩnje. Mũreke tũgĩe na iruga na tũkũngũĩre. 
Luke15:24 Nĩgũkorwo mũriũ ũyũ wakwa ararĩ mũkuũ na nĩariũkĩte; nĩarorĩte na rĩu nĩonekete.’ Nĩ ũndũ ũcio makĩambĩrĩria gũkũngũĩra. 
Luke15:25 “Na rĩrĩ, hĩndĩ ĩyo mũriũ ũrĩa mũkũrũ aarĩ mũgũnda. Na rĩrĩa aakuhĩrĩirie mũciĩ akĩinũka-rĩ, akĩigua gũkĩinwo nyĩmbo na ndũhiũ." 
Luke15:26 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũriũ ũcio agĩĩta ndungata ĩmwe ya mũciĩ, akĩmĩũria gĩtũmi kĩa maũndũ macio." 
Luke15:27 Nayo ndungata ĩyo ĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Mũrũ wa maitũguo nĩokĩte, nake thoguo nĩamũthĩnjĩire njaũ ya gĩcegũ ĩrĩa noru, tondũ nĩamũcookereire arĩ mwega na arĩ mũgima.’" 
Luke15:28 “Mũrũ wa nyina ũcio mũkũrũ akĩrakara na akĩrega gũtoonya nyũmba. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ithe akiuma nja, akĩmũthaitha atoonye thĩinĩ." 
Luke15:29 No akĩĩra ithe atĩrĩ, ‘Ta thikĩrĩria! Ndũire ngũrutagĩra wĩra mĩaka ĩyo yothe, na ndirĩ ndarega gũgwathĩkĩra. No rĩrĩ, ndũrĩ waahe o na koori nĩguo tũkũngũĩre na arata akwa." 
Luke15:30 No rĩrĩa mũrũguo ũyũ ũitangĩte indo ciaku na maraya ainũka, ũkamũthĩnjĩra njaũ ya gĩcegũ ĩrĩa noru!’" 
Luke15:31 “Ithe akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Mũrũ wakwa, wee tũtũũraga nawe hĩndĩ ciothe, na indo ciothe iria ndĩ nacio nĩ ciaku." 
Luke15:32 No nĩtwagĩrĩirwo gũkũngũĩra na gũcanjamũka, tondũ mũrũ wa maitũguo ũyũ ararĩ mũkuũ na rĩu nĩariũkĩte; nĩarorĩte na rĩu nĩonekete.’ ”" 
Luke16:1 Nake Jesũ akĩĩra arutwo ake atĩrĩ: “Nĩ kwarĩ na mũndũ ũmwe warĩ gĩtonga, nake nĩ aarĩ na mũrori wa indo ciake mũrori ũcio nĩathitangirwo kũrĩ gĩtonga kĩu atĩ nĩaitangaga indo ciake." 
Luke16:2 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio agĩĩta mũrori ũcio wa indo, akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Ũhoro ũcio ndĩraigua ũgũkoniĩ nĩ ũrĩkũ? Heana ũhoro wa ithabu rĩa ũrũgamĩrĩri waku, tondũ ndũgũcooka kũndorera indo ciakwa rĩngĩ.’" 
Luke16:3 “Nake mũrori wa indo icio akĩĩyũria na ngoro atĩrĩ, ‘Ngwĩka atĩa rĩu? Mwathi wakwa nĩekũndigithia wĩra. Ndirĩ na hinya mũiganu wa kũrĩma, na nĩngũconoka kũhooya." 
Luke16:4 Rĩu nĩndamenya ũrĩa ngwĩka nĩgeetha rĩrĩa ngaatigithio wĩra gũkũ, andũ makaanyamũkagĩra kwao mĩciĩ.’" 
Luke16:5 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio agĩĩta mũndũ o wothe warĩ na thiirĩ wa mwathi wake. Akĩũria mũndũ wa mbere atĩrĩ, ‘Wee ũrĩ na thiirĩ ũigana atĩa wa mwathi wakwa?’" 
Luke16:6 “Nake akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, ‘Ndĩ na thiirĩ wa marebe magana meerĩ ma maguta ma mĩtamaiyũ.’ “Mũrori ũcio akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Oya marũa maku ma thiirĩ ũikare thĩ narua wandĩke atĩ ũrĩ na thiirĩ wa marebe igana rĩmwe.’" 
Luke16:7 “Agĩcooka akĩũria mũndũ wa keerĩ atĩrĩ, ‘Na we ũrĩ na thiirĩ ũigana atĩa?’ “Nake akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, ‘Ndĩ na thiirĩ wa makũnia igana rĩmwe ma ngano.’ “Mũrori ũcio akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Oya marũa maku ma thiirĩ wandĩke ũrĩ na thiirĩ wa makũnia mĩrongo ĩnana.’" 
Luke16:8 “Mwathi ũcio nĩagathĩrĩirie mũrũgamĩrĩri ũcio wa indo ciake ũtaarĩ mwĩhokeku nĩ ũndũ wa kũgĩa na ũũgĩ. Nĩgũkorwo andũ a gũkũ thĩ nĩ oogĩ na maũndũ mao gũkĩra andũ a ũtheri. 
Luke16:9 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ, hũthagĩrai ũtonga wa gũkũ thĩ na gũthondeka ũrata na andũ, nĩguo rĩrĩa ũtonga ũcio ũgaathira, mũkaamũkĩrwo ciikaro-inĩ iria cia tene na tene." 
Luke16:10 “Mũndũ ũrĩa wothe ũngĩĩhokerwo indo nini no ehokerwo o na indo nyingĩ, na ũrĩa wothe ũtangĩĩhokeka na indo nini o na nyingĩ ndangĩĩhokerwo." 
Luke16:11 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũngĩkorwo mũtarĩ ehokeku na ũtonga wa gũkũ thĩ-rĩ, nũũ ũngĩmwĩhokera ũtonga ũrĩa wa ma?" 
Luke16:12 Ningĩ mũngĩkorwo mũtarĩ ehokeku na indo cia andũ arĩa angĩ-rĩ, nũũ ũngĩmũhe indo cianyu ene?" 
Luke16:13 “Gũtirĩ ndungata ĩngĩhota gũtungatĩra aathani eerĩ. Nĩ ũndũ no ĩthũũrire ũmwe yende ũcio ũngĩ, kana ĩĩheane harĩ ũmwe, ĩnyarare ũcio ũngĩ. Mũtingĩtungatĩra Ngai na mũtungatĩre mbeeca.”" 
Luke16:14 Nao Afarisai, arĩa meendete mbeeca, rĩrĩa maiguire maũndũ macio mothe, makĩambĩrĩria gũtemba Jesũ." 
Luke16:15 Nake akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Inyuĩ mwĩtuuaga ega maitho-inĩ ma andũ, no Ngai nĩoĩ ngoro cianyu, nĩgũkorwo ũndũ ũrĩa ũtuagwo wa bata mũno harĩ andũ, nĩguo ũrĩ magigi maitho-inĩ ma Ngai." 
Luke16:16 “Ũhoro wa Watho na ũrutani wa Anabii watũire ũhunjagio nginya hĩndĩ ya Johana ũrĩa Mũbatithania. Kuuma hĩndĩ ĩyo, Ũhoro-ũrĩa-Mwega wa ũthamaki-wa-Ngai nĩ ũhunjagio, na mũndũ o wothe nĩehatagĩrĩria aũtoonye." 
Luke16:17 Nĩ ũhũthũ igũrũ na thĩ gũthira, gũkĩra gaturumo karĩa kanini mũno ka Watho keherio watho-inĩ." 
Luke16:18 “Mũndũ ũrĩa wothe ũngĩtigana na mũtumia acooke ahikie mũtumia ũngĩ, ũcio nĩatharĩtie, nake mũndũ mũrũme ũrĩa ũngĩhikia mũtumia ũtiganĩte na mũthuuri-we, nĩatharĩtie.”" 
Luke16:19 “Nĩ kwarĩ mũndũ warĩ gĩtonga wehumbaga nguo cia rangi wa ndathi na cia mũthemba wa gatani ĩrĩa njega, nake nĩeekenagia o mũthenya." 
Luke16:20 Na rĩrĩ, kĩhingo-inĩ gĩake nĩhaigagwo mũndũ wahooyaga thendi wetagwo Lazaro, waiyũrĩtwo nĩ ironda mwĩrĩ," 
Luke16:21 nake nĩeeriragĩria kũrĩa rũitĩki rũrĩa rwagũũaga kuuma metha-inĩ ya gĩtonga kĩu. O na ngui nacio nĩciokaga na igacũna ironda ciake. 
Luke16:22 “Ihinda nĩrĩakinyire mũhooi thendi ũcio agĩkua, nao araika makĩmũkuua makĩmũtwara harĩ Iburahĩmu. Gĩtonga kĩu o nakĩo nĩgĩakuire na gĩgĩthikwo." 
Luke16:23 Kĩrĩ kũu icua-inĩ, kĩna ruo rũnene, gĩgĩtiira maitho, gĩkĩona Iburahĩmu arĩ haraaya, na Lazaro arĩ hau nake." 
Luke16:24 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio gĩtonga gĩkĩmwĩta gĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Iburahĩmu, Baba, njiguĩra tha, ũtũme Lazaro atobokie mũthia wa kĩara gĩake maaĩ-inĩ ooke aahehie rũrĩmĩ, tondũ ndĩ na ruo rũnene gũkũ mwaki-inĩ ũyũ.’" 
Luke16:25 “Nowe Iburahĩmu akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, ‘Mũrũ wakwa, ririkana rĩrĩa watũire muoyo woonaga o maũndũ mega, hĩndĩ ĩyo Lazaro nake oonaga o maũndũ mooru, no rĩu we nĩmũnyamarũre, nawe ũrĩ ruo-inĩ." 
Luke16:26 Hamwe na ũguo-rĩ, gatagatĩ gaitũ nawe harĩ na mũkuru mũriku mũno wĩkĩrĩtwo, nĩguo arĩa mangĩenda kuuma gũkũ tũrĩ moke kũrĩ we matikaahote, o na gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngiuma kũu akĩre ooke gũkũ tũrĩ.’" 
Luke16:27 “Nakĩo gĩtonga kĩu gĩgĩcookia atĩrĩ, ‘Ndagĩgũthaitha, baba, ũtũme Lazaro kũrĩ andũ a nyũmba ya baba," 
Luke16:28 nĩgũkorwo ndĩ na ariũ a baba atano. Reke athiĩ akamahe ũhoro, nĩguo matikanooke gũkũ kũrĩ na ruo rũnene ũũ.’" 
Luke16:29 “Iburahĩmu akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, ‘Marĩ na Musa na Anabii; nĩmamathikĩrĩrie.’" 
Luke16:30 “Nakĩo gĩtonga gĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Iburahĩmu, baba, acio ti aiganu; mũndũ angĩthiĩ kũrĩ o oimĩte kũrĩ arĩa akuũ, no merire.’" 
Luke16:31 “Agĩkĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, ‘Angĩkorwo matingĩigua Musa na Anabii, o na mũndũ angĩriũka kuuma kũrĩ arĩa akuũ matingĩmũigua.’ ”" 
Luke17:1 Nake Jesũ akĩĩra arutwo ake atĩrĩ, “Maũndũ marĩa matũmaga andũ mehie no nginya moke, no mũndũ ũrĩa ũtũmaga maũndũ macio moke kaĩ arĩ na haaro-ĩ!" 
Luke17:2 Nĩ kaba mũndũ ta ũcio ohererwo ihiga rĩa gĩthĩi ngingo aikio iria-inĩ, gũkĩra atũme kamwe ga twana tũtũ tũnini keehie." 
Luke17:3 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ, ikaragai mwĩiguĩte. “Mũrũ wa thoguo kana mwarĩ wa thoguo angĩĩhia, mũkaanie, na angĩĩrira-rĩ, mũrekere." 
Luke17:4 Angĩkwĩhĩria maita mũgwanja o mũthenya ũmwe, na maita macio mothe mũgwanja agooka harĩ we agakwĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Nĩndahera,’ nĩ wega ũmũrekere.”" 
Luke17:5 Nao atũmwo makĩĩra Mwathani atĩrĩ, “Tuongerere wĩtĩkio!”" 
Luke17:6 Nake akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Mũngĩkorwo na wĩtĩkio o mũnini ta kabegũ ga karatarĩ-rĩ, mwera mũkũyũ ũyũ atĩrĩ, ‘Kũũrũka, ũkehaande iria-inĩ,’ naguo no ũmwathĩkĩre." 
Luke17:7 “Nĩ mũndũ ũrĩkũ wanyu ũngĩkorwo arĩ na ndungata ya kũmũrĩmĩra na mũraũ kana ya kũmũrĩithĩria ngʼondu, na ndungata ĩyo yoimĩra mũgũnda amĩĩre atĩrĩ, ‘Ũka ũikare thĩ ũrĩe?’" 
Luke17:8 Githĩ to amĩĩrire atĩrĩ, ‘Thondekera irio cia hwaĩ-inĩ, na wĩhaarĩrie ũnjikarie ngĩrĩa na ngĩnyua; na thuutha ũcio no ũrĩe na ũnyue’?" 
Luke17:9 Ningĩ no agĩcookerie ndungata ĩyo ngaatho nĩ gwĩka ũrĩa ĩĩrĩtwo ĩĩke? 
Luke17:10 Ũguo noguo o na inyuĩ, rĩrĩa mweka ũrĩa wothe mwĩrĩtwo mwĩke, ugagai atĩrĩ, ‘Tũrĩ o ndungata itarĩ kĩene; twaruta o wĩra witũ tu.’ ”" 
Luke17:11 Na rĩrĩ, Jesũ arĩ rũgendo-inĩ rwa gũthiĩ Jerusalemu nĩagereire mũhaka-inĩ wa Samaria na Galili." 
Luke17:12 Na rĩrĩa aatoonyaga gatũũra kamwe, agĩtũngwo nĩ andũ ikũmi maarĩ na mũrimũ wa mangũ. Makĩrũgama o haraaya," 
Luke17:13 makĩanĩrĩra na mũgambo mũnene, makiuga atĩrĩ, “Jesũ, Mwathi witũ, tũiguĩre tha!”" 
Luke17:14 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aamoonire, akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Thiĩi mũkeyonanie kũrĩ athĩnjĩri-Ngai.” Na rĩrĩa maathiiaga-rĩ, magĩtherio." 
Luke17:15 Rĩrĩa ũmwe wao onire nĩahonio, akĩhũndũka akĩgooca Ngai na mũgambo mũnene," 
Luke17:16 Akĩĩgũithia thĩ magũrũ-inĩ ma Jesũ, akĩmũcookeria ngaatho. Mũndũ ũcio aarĩ Mũsamaria." 
Luke17:17 Jesũ akĩũria atĩrĩ, “Githĩ othe ikũmi matiatherio? Acio angĩ kenda marĩ ha?" 
Luke17:18 Gũtirĩ o na ũmwe ũngĩcooka kũhe Ngai ũgooci tiga o mũgeni ũyũ?” 
Luke17:19 Agĩcooka akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ũkĩra wĩthiĩre; gwĩtĩkia gwaku nĩkuo gwatũma ũhone.”" 
Luke17:20 Na rĩrĩ, hĩndĩ ĩmwe Afarisai nĩmoririe Jesũ rĩrĩa ũthamaki wa Ngai ũgooka. Nake akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Ũthamaki wa Ngai ndũũkaga na imenyithia iria mũngĩĩrorera," 
Luke17:21 kana andũ moige atĩrĩ, ‘Ũrĩ haha,’ kana ‘Ũrĩ harĩa,’ tondũ ũthamaki wa Ngai ũrĩ thĩinĩ wanyu.”" 
Luke17:22 Agĩcooka akĩĩra arutwo ake atĩrĩ, “Ihinda nĩrĩroka rĩrĩa mũkeriragĩria kuona mũthenya ũmwe wa Mũrũ wa Mũndũ, no mũtikawona." 
Luke17:23 Andũ nĩmakamwĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Arĩ harĩa!’ kana ‘Arĩ haha!’ Mũtikanatengʼere mũmarũmĩrĩre." 
Luke17:24 O ta ũrĩa rũheni rũhenũkaga rũkamũrĩka matu kuuma mũthia ũmwe nginya ũrĩa ũngĩ, no taguo gũũka kwa Mũrũ wa Mũndũ gũkahaana mũthenya ũcio wake." 
Luke17:25 No rĩrĩ, no nginya ambe one mathĩĩna maingĩ na aregwo nĩ andũ a rũciaro rũrũ." 
Luke17:26 “O ta ũrĩa gwatariĩ matukũ-inĩ ma Nuhu, noguo gũkaahaana matukũ-inĩ ma Mũrũ wa Mũndũ." 
Luke17:27 Andũ acio maakorirwo makĩrĩa, na makĩnyua, na makĩhikania, na makĩhikio, o nginya mũthenya ũrĩa Nuhu aatoonyire thabina. Hĩndĩ ĩyo kĩguũ kĩnene gĩgĩũka gĩkĩmaniina othe." 
Luke17:28 “Ningĩ ũguo noguo gwatariĩ matukũ-inĩ ma Loti. Andũ acio maakorirwo makĩrĩa na makĩnyua, na makĩgũra na makĩendia, na makĩhaanda na magĩaka nyũmba." 
Luke17:29 No mũthenya ũrĩa Loti oimire Sodomu, mwaki na ũbiriti ikiura ta mbura kuuma igũrũ, ikĩmaniina othe." 
Luke17:30 “Ũguo noguo gũkahaana mũthenya ũrĩa Mũrũ wa Mũndũ akaaguũranĩrio. 
Luke17:31 Mũthenya ũcio, mũndũ o wothe ũgaakorwo arĩ nyũmba igũrũ, na indo ciake irĩ nyũmba thĩinĩ, ndakanaharũrũke gũcigĩĩra. Ningĩ o na mũndũ ũrĩa ũgaakorwo arĩ mũgũnda ndakanahũndũke agĩĩre kĩndũ." 
Luke17:32 Ta ririkanai mũtumia wa Loti! 
Luke17:33 Mũndũ ũrĩa wothe ũgeragia gũtũũria muoyo wake nĩakoorwo nĩguo, nake ũrĩa wothe ũũragwo nĩ muoyo wake nĩakaũtũũria." 
Luke17:34 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ, ũtukũ ũcio andũ eerĩ nĩmagakorwo makomete ũrĩrĩ ũmwe, nake ũmwe wao akuuo, na ũrĩa ũngĩ atigwo." 
Luke17:35 Atumia eerĩ nĩmagakorwo magĩthĩa hamwe; ũmwe wao akuuo, na ũrĩa ũngĩ atigwo." 
Luke17:36 (Ningĩ arũme eerĩ nĩmagakorwo makĩruta wĩra hamwe, ũmwe wao akuuo, ũrĩa ũngĩ atigwo.)”" 
Luke17:37 Nao makĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Kũu nĩ kũ Mwathani?” Nake akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Nderi ciũnganaga harĩa hothe harĩ kĩimba.”" 
Luke18:1 Nake Jesũ akĩhe arutwo ake ngerekano ya kũmaruta atĩ nĩmagĩrĩirwo nĩkũhooyaga hĩndĩ ciothe mategũkua ngoro. 
Luke18:2 Akĩmeera atĩrĩ: “Itũũra-inĩ rĩmwe nĩ kwarĩ na mũtuanĩri ciira ũteetigagĩra Ngai kana agatĩĩa andũ. 
Luke18:3 Na itũũra-inĩ rĩu nĩ kwarĩ mũtumia ũmwe wa ndigwa wathiiaga kũrĩ we kaingĩ akamwĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Ndĩhĩria harĩ thũ ciakwa.’" 
Luke18:4 “No mũtuanĩri ciira ũcio akĩrega kũmũteithia kwa ihinda. No marigĩrĩrio akĩĩra na ngoro atĩrĩ, ‘O na gũtuĩka ndiĩtigĩrĩte Ngai kana ngatĩĩa andũ-rĩ," 
Luke18:5 no tondũ wa ũrĩa mũtumia ũyũ wa ndigwa atiindaga agĩĩthĩĩnia, nĩngũtigĩrĩra ciira wake nĩwatuuo na kĩhooto nĩguo atige kũũnogagia na gũtindaga agĩũka!’ ”" 
Luke18:6 Nake Mwathani akiuga atĩrĩ, “Nĩmwaigua ũrĩa mũtuanĩri ciira ũcio ũtarĩ kĩhooto oigire?" 
Luke18:7 Githĩ o nake Ngai ndagatua ciira na kĩhooto wa arĩa ake ethuurĩire, o arĩa mamũkayagĩra mũthenya na ũtukũ? No aage kũmateithia na ihenya?" 
Luke18:8 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ, agaatigĩrĩra atĩ nĩmaciirĩrwo na kĩhooto, o na ningĩ na ihenya. O na kũrĩ ũguo-rĩ, rĩrĩa Mũrũ wa Mũndũ agooka-rĩ, nĩagakora andũ metĩkĩtie gũkũ thĩ?”" 
Luke18:9 Ningĩ Jesũ akĩarĩria andũ amwe arĩa meĩhokaga o ene, magetuaga athingu na makahũthagia andũ arĩa angĩ othe, akĩmahe ngerekano, akĩmeera atĩrĩ:" 
Luke18:10 “Andũ eerĩ nĩmambatire hekarũ-inĩ kũhooya. Ũmwe aarĩ Mũfarisai na ũcio ũngĩ aarĩ mwĩtia wa mbeeca cia igooti. 
Luke18:11 Mũfarisai ũcio akĩrũgama akĩĩhooera we mwene, akiuga atĩrĩ, ‘Ngai, nĩndagũcookeria ngaatho nĩgũkorwo ndihaana ta andũ arĩa angĩ, arĩa atunyani, na arĩa mekaga ũũru, na itharia, o na kana ta mwĩtia ũyũ wa mbeeca cia igooti." 
Luke18:12 Nĩndĩĩhingaga kũrĩa irio maita meerĩ o kiumia, na ngaruta gĩcunjĩ gĩa ikũmi kĩa indo ciothe iria nyonaga.’" 
Luke18:13 “No rĩrĩ, mwĩtia wa mbeeca cia igooti ũcio akĩrũgama o haraaya; na ndaigana gũtiira maitho make na igũrũ, no nĩ kwĩgũtha eegũthaga gĩthũri enyiihĩtie, akoiga atĩrĩ, ‘Ngai, njiguĩra tha, niĩ mũndũ mwĩhia.’" 
Luke18:14 “Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ, mwĩtia mbeeca cia igooti nĩainũkire atuĩtwo mũthingu mbere ya Ngai gũkĩra ũcio ũngĩ. Nĩgũkorwo ũrĩa wothe wĩtũgagĩria nĩakanyiihio nake ũrĩa wĩnyiihagia nĩagatũũgĩrio.”" 
Luke18:15 Na rĩrĩ, andũ nao nĩmarehagĩra Jesũ twana nĩguo atũhutie. Arutwo ake mona ũguo, makĩmakaania." 
Luke18:16 Nowe Jesũ agĩĩta twana tũu harĩ we, akiuga atĩrĩ, “Rekei twana tũu tũũke kũrĩ niĩ, tigai gũtũgiria, nĩgũkorwo ũthamaki wa Ngai nĩ wa arĩa matariĩ ta tuo." 
Luke18:17 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma, ũrĩa wothe ũtakamũkĩra ũthamaki wa Ngai ta kaana ndakaũtoonya.”" 
Luke18:18 Mũnene ũmwe akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Mũrutani mwega, ingĩĩka atĩa nĩguo ngaagaya muoyo wa tene na tene?”" 
Luke18:19 Nake Jesũ akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Ũkũnjĩta mwega nĩkĩ? Gũtirĩ o na ũmwe mwega tiga Ngai we wiki." 
Luke18:20 We nĩũĩ ũrĩa maathani moigĩte, ‘Ndũkanatharanie, na ndũkanoragane, na ndũkanaiye, na ndũkanaigĩrĩre mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩ kĩgeenyo, na tĩĩa thoguo na nyũkwa.’ ”" 
Luke18:21 Nake akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Maathani macio mothe ndũire ndĩmarũmĩtie kuuma ndĩ o mũnini.”" 
Luke18:22 Jesũ aigua ũguo, akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Harĩ ũndũ ũmwe ũtigarĩtie gwĩka. Thiĩ wendie kĩrĩa gĩothe ũrĩ nakĩo ũhe athĩĩni mbeeca icio, na nĩũkũgĩa na mũthiithũ igũrũ. Ũcooke ũũke ũnũmĩrĩre.”" 
Luke18:23 Rĩrĩa mũnene ũcio aiguire ũguo, akĩigua kĩeha mũno, tondũ aarĩ mũtongu mũno." 
Luke18:24 Jesũ akĩmũrora, akiuga atĩrĩ, “Kaĩ nĩ hinya andũ arĩa atongu gũtoonya ũthamaki-inĩ wa Ngai-ĩ!" 
Luke18:25 Nĩ ũhũthũ ngamĩĩra ĩhungurĩre irima rĩa cindano, gũkĩra gĩtonga gũtoonya ũthamaki-inĩ wa Ngai.”" 
Luke18:26 Nao arĩa maiguire ũhoro ũcio makĩũria atĩrĩ, “Nũũ ũngĩkĩhota kũhonoka?”" 
Luke18:27 Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Maũndũ marĩa matahotekaga nĩ andũ nĩmahotekaga nĩ Ngai.”" 
Luke18:28 Nake Petero akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ithuĩ tũtigĩte maũndũ maitũ mothe tũgakũrũmĩrĩra!”" 
Luke18:29 Jesũ akĩmeera, “Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma, gũtirĩ mũndũ ũtigĩte mũciĩ wake, kana mũtumia wake, kana ariũ a nyina, kana aciari ake, o na kana ciana ciake, nĩ ũndũ wa ũthamaki wa Ngai," 
Luke18:30 ũtakaheo maita maingĩ ma kĩrĩa atigĩte ihinda-inĩ rĩĩrĩ tũrĩ, na ihinda rĩrĩa rĩgooka aheo muoyo wa tene na tene.”" 
Luke18:31 Na rĩrĩ, Jesũ agĩtwara arutwo ake arĩa ikũmi na eerĩ handũ keheri-inĩ akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Nĩtũkwambata tũthiĩ Jerusalemu, na maũndũ mothe marĩa maandĩkirwo nĩ anabii makoniĩ Mũrũ wa Mũndũ no nginya mahingio." 
Luke18:32 Nake nĩakaneanwo kũrĩ andũ-a-Ndũrĩrĩ. Nao nĩ makaamũnyũrũria, na mamũrume, na mamũtuĩre mata, na mamũhũũre iboko, o na mamũũrage." 
Luke18:33 Naguo mũthenya wa gatatũ nĩakariũka.” 
Luke18:34 Nao arutwo ake makĩaga kũmenya ũndũ o na ũmwe wa macio. Nĩmahithĩtwo ũhoro ũcio na matiamenyire ũrĩa aameeraga. 
Luke18:35 Nake Jesũ akuhĩrĩria Jeriko, mũndũ warĩ mũtumumu nĩaikarĩte mũkĩra-inĩ wa njĩra akĩhooya mbeeca." 
Luke18:36 Rĩrĩa aiguire andũ aingĩ makĩhĩtũka, akĩũria ũrĩa gwekĩkaga." 
Luke18:37 Andũ makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Nĩ Jesũ wa Nazarethi ũrahĩtũka.”" 
Luke18:38 Nake akĩanĩrĩra, akiuga atĩrĩ, “Jesũ, mũrũ wa Daudi, njiguĩra tha.”" 
Luke18:39 Arĩa maatongoretie makĩmũkaania makĩmwĩra akire, nowe agĩkĩrĩrĩria kwanĩrĩra akiugaga atĩrĩ, “Mũrũ wa Daudi, njiguĩra tha!”" 
Luke18:40 Nake Jesũ akĩrũgama, agĩathana, mũndũ ũcio atwarwo harĩ we." 
Luke18:41 Rĩrĩa aakuhĩrĩirie, Jesũ akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Ũkwenda ngwĩkĩre atĩa?” Nake akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Mwathani, ngwenda njooke kuona.”" 
Luke18:42 Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Cooka kuona, gwĩtĩkia gwaku nĩkuo gwatũma ũhone.”" 
Luke18:43 O rĩmwe akĩambĩrĩria kuona, nake akĩrũmĩrĩra Jesũ, akĩgoocaga Ngai. Rĩrĩa andũ othe moonire ũguo, o nao makĩgooca Ngai." 
Luke19:1 Na rĩrĩ, Jesũ nĩatoonyire Jeriko, akĩhĩtũkĩra kuo." 
Luke19:2 Nakuo kũu Jeriko nĩ kwarĩ mũndũ wetagwo Zakayo; warĩ mũnene wa etia mbeeca cia igooti na aarĩ gĩtonga. 
Luke19:3 Nĩendaga kuona Jesũ aarĩ ũ, no ndangĩahotire kũmuona nĩ ũndũ wa ũingĩ wa andũ, na tondũ aarĩ mũndũ mũkuhĩ." 
Luke19:4 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio akĩhanyũka mbere yao, akĩhaica mũkũyũ nĩguo amuone, nĩgũkorwo Jesũ aageragĩra njĩra ĩyo." 
Luke19:5 Nake Jesũ aakinya hau, agĩtiira maitho na igũrũ, akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Zakayo, harũrũka narua, tondũ ũmũthĩ no nginya thiĩ gwaku mũciĩ.”" 
Luke19:6 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio akĩharũrũka narua, akĩmũnyiita ũgeni akenete." 
Luke19:7 Nao andũ moona ũguo makĩambĩrĩria kũnuguna, makiuga atĩrĩ, “Mũndũ ũyũ aathiĩ gũceera kwa mũndũ mwĩhia.”" 
Luke19:8 Nowe Zakayo akĩrũgama, akĩĩra Mwathani atĩrĩ, “Mwathani, rĩu nĩngũheana nuthu ya indo ciakwa kũrĩ athĩĩni, na hangĩkorwo harĩ mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ ndunyĩte kĩndũ, nĩngũmũrĩha kĩndũ kĩu maita mana.”" 
Luke19:9 Nake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ũmũthĩ ũhonokio nĩũkinyĩte nyũmba ĩno, tondũ mũndũ ũyũ o nake nĩ mũrũ wa Iburahĩmu." 
Luke19:10 Nĩgũkorwo Mũrũ wa Mũndũ ookire gũcaria na kũhonokia kĩrĩa kĩũrĩte.” 
Luke19:11 Na o mathikĩrĩirie maũndũ macio, agĩthiĩ na mbere kũmahe ũhoro na ngerekano, tondũ nĩakuhĩrĩirie Jerusalemu, na andũ acio meciiragia atĩ ũthamaki wa Ngai warĩ o hakuhĩ gũkinya." 
Luke19:12 Akĩmeera atĩrĩ: “Mũndũ ũmwe warĩ igweta nĩathiire bũrũri wa kũraya agatuuo mũthamaki, na thuutha wa ũguo acooke." 
Luke19:13 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio agĩĩta ndungata ciake ikũmi, agĩcihe mina ikũmi, agĩciĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Onjorithagiai mbeeca ici nginya rĩrĩa ngacooka.’" 
Luke19:14 “No andũ a bũrũri wake nĩmamũthũire, nao magĩtũma andũ mamuume thuutha makoige atĩrĩ, ‘Tũtikwenda mũndũ ũyũ atuĩke mũthamaki witũ.’" 
Luke19:15 “Na rĩrĩ, rĩrĩa aacookire arĩkĩtie gũtuuo mũthamaki, agĩtũmanĩra ndungata iria aaneete mbeeca, nĩguo amenye uumithio ũrĩa cionete." 
Luke19:16 “Ndungata ya mbere ĩgĩũka, ĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Mwathi, mina yaku nĩyumithĩtie mina ingĩ ikũmi.’" 
Luke19:17 “Nake Mwathi wayo akĩmĩcookeria atĩrĩ, ‘Nĩwĩkĩte wega, wee ndungata yakwa njega! Na tondũ wa kwĩhokeka na ũndũ mũnini ũguo, tuĩka mũrori wa matũũra manene ikũmi.’" 
Luke19:18 “Nayo ndungata ya keerĩ ĩgĩũka, ĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Mwathi, mina yaku nĩyumithĩtie mina ingĩ ithano.’" 
Luke19:19 “Nake mwathi wayo akĩmĩĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Tuĩka mũrori wa matũũra manene matano.’" 
Luke19:20 “Nayo, ndungata ya gatatũ ĩgĩũka, ĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Mwathi, mina yaku nĩyo ĩno; ndaamĩohire na gĩtambaya ngĩmĩhitha." 
Luke19:21 Nĩndagwĩtigĩrire, tondũ ũrĩ mũndũ mũũru. Nĩwoyaga kĩrĩa ũtarutĩire wĩra, na ũkagetha kĩrĩa ũtahandĩte.’" 
Luke19:22 “Nake mwathi wayo akĩmĩcookeria atĩrĩ, ‘Wee ndungata ĩno njaganu! Ngũgũtuĩra ciira kũringana na ciugo ciaku. Githĩ nĩwooĩ atĩ ndĩ mũũru, na atĩ njoyaga kĩrĩa itarutĩire wĩra na ngagetha kĩrĩa itahaandĩte?" 
Luke19:23 Wakĩagire kũiga mbeeca ciakwa bengi nĩkĩ, nĩgeetha rĩrĩa ngaacooka ndĩcioye irĩ na uumithio?’" 
Luke19:24 “Agĩcooka akĩĩra arĩa maarũgamĩte hau atĩrĩ, ‘Mũtunyei mina ĩyo arĩ nayo, mũmĩnengere ũrĩa ũrĩ na mina ikũmi.’" 
Luke19:25 “Makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Mwathi, githĩ ndarĩ na mina ikũmi!’" 
Luke19:26 “Nake akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, ‘Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ, mũndũ ũrĩa wothe ũrĩ na kĩndũ, nĩakongererwo ingĩ nyingĩ, no ũrĩa ũtarĩ na kĩndũ, o na kĩrĩa arĩ nakĩo nĩagatuunywo." 
Luke19:27 No rĩrĩ, andũ acio marĩ ũthũ na niĩ, o acio mateendaga nduĩke mũthamaki wao-rĩ, marehei, mũmooragĩre o haha ndĩ.’ ”" 
Luke19:28 Nake Jesũ aarĩkia kuuga ũguo, agĩthiĩ na mbere kwambata erekeire Jerusalemu." 
Luke19:29 Aakuhĩrĩria Bethifage na Bethania, o kũu Kĩrĩma-inĩ kĩa Mĩtamaiyũ, agĩtũma arutwo ake eerĩ, akĩmeera atĩrĩ," 
Luke19:30 “Thiĩi itũũra rĩrĩa rĩrĩ mbere yanyu, na mũgĩtoonya, nĩmũkuona njaũ ya ndigiri yohetwo hau, nayo ndĩrĩ yakuua mũndũ; mĩohorei mũmĩrehe." 
Luke19:31 Mũndũ angĩmũũria atĩrĩ, ‘Nĩ kĩĩ kĩratũma mũmĩohore?’ Mwĩrei atĩrĩ, ‘Mwathani nĩabatarĩtio nĩyo.’ ”" 
Luke19:32 Nao acio maatũmirwo magĩthiĩ, magĩkora maũndũ matariĩ o ta ũrĩa Jesũ aamerĩte." 
Luke19:33 Na rĩrĩa moohoraga njaũ ĩyo, eene yo makĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Mũroohora njaũ ĩyo nĩkĩ?”" 
Luke19:34 Nao magĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Mwathani nĩabatarĩtio nĩyo.”" 
Luke19:35 Makĩmĩtwarĩra Jesũ, magĩcooka makĩigĩrĩra nguo ciao igũrũ rĩa njaũ ĩyo, na magĩikarĩria Jesũ igũrũ rĩayo." 
Luke19:36 Na rĩrĩa aathiiaga, andũ makĩara nguo ciao njĩra-inĩ." 
Luke19:37 Rĩrĩa aakinyire hakuhĩ na njĩra ĩrĩa ĩikũrũkagĩra Kĩrĩma-inĩ kĩa Mĩtamaiyũ, gĩkundi gĩothe kĩa arutwo gĩkĩambĩrĩria kũgooca Ngai, andũ makĩanĩrĩra makenete nĩ ũndũ wa ciama iria ciothe moonete makiuga atĩrĩ:" 
Luke19:38 “Kũrathimwo-rĩ, nĩ mũthamaki ũrĩa ũgũũka na rĩĩtwa rĩa Mwathani!” “Thayũ ũrogĩa kũu igũrũ, naguo riiri ũgĩe kũu igũrũ mũno!”" 
Luke19:39 Afarisai amwe maarĩ gĩkundi-inĩ kĩu makĩĩra Jesũ atĩrĩ, “Mũrutani, kaania arutwo aku!”" 
Luke19:40 Nowe akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ, aya maangĩkira, mahiga no maanĩrĩre.”" 
Luke19:41 Na rĩrĩa aakuhĩrĩirie itũũra rĩu inene rĩa Jerusalemu, aarĩona akĩrĩra nĩ ũndũ warĩo," 
Luke19:42 akiuga atĩrĩ, “Naarĩ korwo ũmũthĩ wee mwene nĩũkũmenyete kĩrĩa kĩngĩkũrehere thayũ! No rĩu, ũhoro ũcio nĩũhithĩtwo maitho maku." 
Luke19:43 Hĩndĩ nĩĩgakinya rĩrĩa thũ ciaku igaaka ihumbu cia tĩĩri ikũrigiicĩrie, na ikũhingĩrĩrie na mĩena yothe." 
Luke19:44 Nĩigagũtungumania thĩ, wee hamwe na ciana ciaku iria irĩ kũu thĩinĩ waku. Matigatiga ihiga o na rĩmwe rĩrĩ igũrũ wa rĩrĩa rĩngĩ, tondũ ndũigana gũkũũrana ihinda rĩrĩa Ngai ookire gũgũceerera.”" 
Luke19:45 Agĩcooka agĩtoonya hekarũ thĩinĩ, na akĩambĩrĩria kũrutũrũra andũ arĩa meendagĩria indo kuo." 
Luke19:46 Akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Nĩ kwandĩkĩtwo atĩrĩ, ‘Nyũmba yakwa ĩgeetagwo nyũmba ya kũhooyagĩrwo’ no inyuĩ mũmĩtuĩte ‘ngurunga ya atunyani.’ ”" 
Luke19:47 Na o mũthenya, nĩarutanaga kũu thĩinĩ wa hekarũ. No athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa anene, na arutani a watho, na atongoria arĩa maarĩ gatagatĩ ka andũ nĩmageragia kũmũũraga." 
Luke19:48 No matingĩonire njĩra ya kũmũũraga, tondũ andũ othe nĩmaikaraga mathikĩrĩirie ciugo ciake." 
Luke20:1 Na rĩrĩ, mũthenya ũmwe akĩruta andũ kũu hekarũ-inĩ na akĩhunjagia Ũhoro-ũrĩa-Mwega-rĩ, athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa anene, na arutani a watho, hamwe na athuuri magĩũka kũrĩ we." 
Luke20:2 Makĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Twĩre wĩkaga maũndũ maya na ũhoti ũrĩkũ. Nũũ wakũheire ũhoti ũcio?”" 
Luke20:3 Nake akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “O na niĩ nĩngũmũũria kĩũria." 
Luke20:4 Ta njĩĩrai, ũbatithio wa Johana-rĩ, woimĩte igũrũ kana woimire kũrĩ andũ?”" 
Luke20:5 Makĩaranĩria o ene ũhoro ũcio, makĩĩrana atĩrĩ, “Tũngiuga atĩ ‘Woimĩte igũrũ’ egũtũũria atĩrĩ, ‘Mwakĩregire kũmwĩtĩkia nĩkĩ?’" 
Luke20:6 Ningĩ tuoiga atĩ ‘Woimĩte kũrĩ andũ’, andũ othe nĩmegũtũhũũra na mahiga nyuguto, nĩ ũndũ nĩmetĩkĩtie atĩ Johana aarĩ mũnabii.”" 
Luke20:7 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio magĩcookeria Jesũ atĩrĩ, “Ithuĩ tũtiũĩ woimĩte kũ.”" 
Luke20:8 Nake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “O na niĩ ndikũmwĩra njĩkaga maũndũ maya na ũhoti ũrĩkũ.”" 
Luke20:9 Agĩcooka akĩhe andũ ũhoro na ngerekano akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Mũndũ ũmwe nĩahaandire mũgũnda wake mĩthabibũ, na akĩũkomborithia arĩmi angĩ, agĩcooka agĩthiĩ kũndũ kũraya na agĩikara kuo ihinda iraaya." 
Luke20:10 Na rĩrĩ, hĩndĩ ya magetha yakinya-rĩ, agĩtũma ndungata yake kũrĩ akombori acio nĩgeetha mamĩnengere maciaro mamwe ma mũgũnda ũcio wa mĩthabibũ. No akombori acio makĩmĩhũũra na makĩmĩingata ĩtarĩ na kĩndũ." 
Luke20:11 Agĩcooka agĩtũma ndungata ĩngĩ, ĩyo o nayo makĩmĩhũũra makĩmĩconorithia na makĩmĩingata ĩtarĩ na kĩndũ." 
Luke20:12 O rĩngĩ agĩtũma ndungata ya gatatũ, nao makĩmĩtiihangia na makĩmĩingata." 
Luke20:13 “Nake mwene mũgũnda ũcio wa mĩthabibũ akĩĩyũria atĩrĩ, ‘Ngwĩka atĩa? Ngũtũma mũrũ wakwa, ũrĩa nyendete; hihi mahota kũmũhe gĩtĩĩo’." 
Luke20:14 “No rĩrĩa akombori acio maamuonire, makĩarĩrĩria ũhoro ũcio. Makĩĩrana atĩrĩ, ‘Ũyũ nĩwe ũkaagaya mũgũnda ũyũ. Nĩtũmũũragei nĩguo igai rĩake rĩtuĩke riitũ.’" 
Luke20:15 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio makĩmũruta nja ya mũgũnda ũcio wa mĩthabibũ, makĩmũũraga. “Rĩu-rĩ, mwene mũgũnda ũcio wa mĩthabibũ-rĩ, akaameka atĩa?" 
Luke20:16 Agooka oorage akombori acio, acooke ahe andũ angĩ mũgũnda ũcio.” Rĩrĩa andũ maiguire ũguo, makiuga atĩrĩ, “Kũroaga gũtuĩka ũguo!”" 
Luke20:17 Jesũ akĩmarora, akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Maandĩko marĩa mandĩkĩtwo atĩrĩ: “ ‘Ihiga rĩrĩa aaki maaregire, nĩrĩo rĩtuĩkĩte ihiga inene rĩa koine’, ũguo nĩ kuuga atĩa?" 
Luke20:18 Mũndũ ũrĩa wothe ũkaagwĩra ihiga rĩu, nĩrĩkamuunanga, no ũrĩa rĩkaagwĩra nĩrĩkamũhehenja.”" 
Luke20:19 Arutani a watho na athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa anene magĩcaria ũrĩa mangĩmũnyiitithia o na ihenya tondũ nĩmamenyire aaheanire ngerekano ĩyo akĩaria ũhoro wao. No nĩmetigagĩra andũ. 
Luke20:20 O makĩmũtuĩragia-rĩ, makĩmũtũmĩra andũ a kũmũthigaana metuĩte andũ ega. Nao magĩthiĩ nĩgeetha mamũnyiite akiuga ũndũ mũũru, nĩguo mamũneane moko-inĩ ma wathani wa barũthi." 
Luke20:21 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio athigaani acio makĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Mũrutani, nĩtũũĩ wee waragia na ũkarutana maũndũ marĩa magĩrĩire, na atĩ ndũtĩagĩra andũ maũthĩ, no wee ũrutanaga ũhoro wa Ngai na ma, ũrĩa kwagĩrĩire." 
Luke20:22 Atĩrĩrĩ, nĩtwagĩrĩirwo nĩ kũrutĩra Kaisari igooti kana ca?”" 
Luke20:23 Nowe Jesũ akĩona ũhinga ũrĩa maarĩ naguo akĩmeera atĩrĩ," 
Luke20:24 “Ta nyoniai mbeeca cianyu. Mbica ĩno na rĩĩtwa rĩĩrĩ nĩ cia ũ?” 
Luke20:25 Makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Nĩ cia Kaisari.” Akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Kĩrutagĩrei Kaisari kĩrĩa kĩrĩ gĩake, na mũrutagĩre Ngai kĩrĩa kĩrĩ gĩake.”" 
Luke20:26 Nao makĩaga ũndũ wa kũmũnyiita naguo harĩ maũndũ marĩa aaririe arĩ mbere ya andũ. Na tondũ wa ũrĩa maagegirio nĩ ũrĩa aamacookeirie ũhoro-rĩ, magĩkira ki." 
Luke20:27 Na rĩrĩ, andũ amwe a Asadukai, arĩa moigaga atĩ gũtirĩ ũhoro wa kũriũka, magĩũka kũrĩ Jesũ, makĩmũũria atĩrĩ," 
Luke20:28 “Mũrutani, Musa aatwandĩkĩire atĩ mũrũ wa nyina na mũndũ angĩkua atige mũtumia atarĩ na ciana-rĩ, mũndũ ũcio no nginya ahikie mũtumia ũcio watigwo nĩguo aciarĩre mũrũ wa nyina ciana." 
Luke20:29 Na rĩrĩ, kwarĩ aanake mũgwanja a nyina ũmwe. Wa mbere akĩhikania na agĩkua, agĩtiga mũtumia atarĩ na ciana." 
Luke20:30 Nake wa keerĩ," 
Luke20:31 na wa gatatũ makĩmũhikia, na makĩrũmanĩrĩra ũguo nginya wa mũgwanja; othe magĩkua, makĩmũtiga atarĩ na ciana." 
Luke20:32 Marigĩrĩrio-inĩ, mũtumia ũcio o nake agĩkua." 
Luke20:33 Rĩu-rĩ, hĩndĩ ya kũriũka agaakorwo arĩ mũtumia wa ũ harĩ acio mũgwanja, nĩgũkorwo othe nĩmamũhikĩtie?”" 
Luke20:34 Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Andũ a ihinda rĩĩrĩ nĩo mahikaga na makahikania." 
Luke20:35 No rĩrĩ, arĩa magaatuuo aagĩrĩru a gũkinya ihinda rĩu o na gũkinyanĩrio ihinda rĩa kũriũka kwa arĩa akuũ-rĩ, acio matikahikanagia o na kana mahikanagie." 
Luke20:36 Andũ acio matigacooka gũkua; nĩgũkorwo makahaana ta araika. Andũ acio magakorwo marĩ ciana cia Ngai, nĩgũkorwo nĩ ciana cia ũhoro ũcio wa kũriũka." 
Luke20:37 Naguo ũhoro wa atĩ andũ arĩa akuũ nĩmariũkagio-rĩ, Musa o nake nĩawonanirie harĩa haarĩ kĩhinga kĩrĩa gĩakanaga mwaki na gĩtihĩe, rĩrĩa eetire Mwathani ‘Ngai wa Iburahĩmu, na Ngai wa Isaaka, na Ngai wa Jakubu.’" 
Luke20:38 We ti Ngai wa arĩa akuũ, no nĩ wa arĩa marĩ muoyo, nĩgũkorwo harĩ we andũ othe arĩa marĩ muoyo matũũragio nĩwe.”" 
Luke20:39 Nao andũ amwe a arutani a watho makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Mũrutani, nĩwoiga wega!”" 
Luke20:40 Na gũtirĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe wageririe kũmũũria ciũria ingĩ. 
Luke20:41 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Andũ moigaga Kristũ nĩ mũriũ wa Daudi nĩ ũndũ wa kĩĩ?" 
Luke20:42 Daudi we mwene nĩoigĩte ibuku-inĩ rĩa Thaburi atĩrĩ: “ ‘Mwathani nĩerire Mwathani wakwa atĩrĩ: “Ikara guoko-inĩ gwakwa kwa ũrĩo," 
Luke20:43 nginya ngaatũma thũ ciaku ituĩke gaturwa ka makinya maku.” ’ 
Luke20:44 Atĩrĩrĩ, Daudi aamwĩtire ‘Mwathani’. Angĩgĩcooka gũtuĩka mũriũ wake atĩa?”" 
Luke20:45 O andũ acio othe mathikĩrĩirie, Jesũ akĩĩra arutwo ake atĩrĩ," 
Luke20:46 “Mwĩmenyererei arutani a watho. O mendaga gũthiĩ mehumbĩte nguo ndaaya, na makenda kũgeithagio ndũnyũ-inĩ, na gũikaragĩra itĩ iria cia bata thunagogi-inĩ, o na gũikara handũ ha andũ arĩa atĩĩku maruga-inĩ." 
Luke20:47 No nĩo matoonyagĩrĩra atumia a ndigwa makamatunya nyũmba ciao, na nĩguo meyonanie, makahooya mahooya maraihu. Andũ ta acio nĩmakaherithio mũno makĩria.”" 
Luke21:1 Na rĩrĩ, aatiira maitho, Jesũ akĩona itonga igĩĩkĩra mĩhothi yao harĩa heekagĩrwo kĩgĩĩna kĩa hekarũ." 
Luke21:2 Agĩcooka akĩona mũtumia mũthĩĩni, warĩ wa ndigwa, agĩĩkĩra tũthendi twĩrĩ o ho thĩinĩ." 
Luke21:3 Akiuga atĩrĩ, “Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma, mũtumia ũyũ mũthĩĩni wa ndigwa nĩahotha mbeeca nyingĩ gũkĩra andũ arĩa angĩ othe." 
Luke21:4 Andũ acio angĩ othe maaheana kũringana na ũtonga wao; no mũtumia ũyũ o na arĩ mũthĩĩni, ahotha kĩrĩa gĩothe oima nakĩo gĩa kũmũtũũria.”" 
Luke21:5 Na rĩrĩ, arutwo amwe ake nĩmaragia ũhoro wa hekarũ, ũrĩa yagemetio na mahiga mathaka na iheo iria ciarutĩirwo Ngai. No Jesũ akiuga atĩrĩ," 
Luke21:6 “Ha ũhoro wa mĩako ĩno mũrona-rĩ, hĩndĩ nĩĩroka rĩrĩa gũtagakorwo ihiga rĩrĩ igũrũ wa rĩrĩa rĩngĩ; mothe nĩmakamomorwo.”" 
Luke21:7 Nao makĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Mũrutani, nĩ rĩ maũndũ macio magekĩka? Na kĩmenyithia kĩa atĩ marĩ hakuhĩ gwĩkĩka nĩ kĩrĩkũ?”" 
Luke21:8 Nake akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Mwĩmenyagĩrĩrei mũtikanaheenio. Nĩgũkorwo andũ aingĩ nĩmagooka na rĩĩtwa rĩakwa makiugaga atĩrĩ, ‘Nĩ niĩ We,’ na ningĩ mamwĩre atĩrĩ, ‘Ihinda nĩrĩkuhĩrĩirie.’ Mũtikanamarũmĩrĩre." 
Luke21:9 Rĩrĩa mũkaigua ũhoro wa mbaara na wa ngũĩ, mũtikanetigĩre. Maũndũ macio no nginya mekĩke mbere, no ũguo ti kuuga ithirĩro nĩikinyu.”" 
Luke21:10 Agĩcooka akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Rũrĩrĩ nĩrũgookĩrĩra rũrĩa rũngĩ, na ũthamaki ũũkĩrĩre ũrĩa ũngĩ." 
Luke21:11 Nĩgũkaagĩa na ithingithia nene mũno, na ngʼaragu, na mĩrimũ mĩũru kũndũ na kũndũ, na maũndũ ma kũmakania na imenyithia nene kuuma igũrũ." 
Luke21:12 “No maũndũ macio mothe matanakinya-rĩ, nĩmũkanyiitwo, na mũnyariirwo na mũneanwo thunagogi-inĩ na njeera o na mũtwarwo mbere ya athamaki na aathani. Maũndũ macio mothe mũgeekwo nĩ ũndũ wa rĩĩtwa rĩakwa." 
Luke21:13 Ũndũ ũyũ ũgaakorwo ũrĩ mweke wanyu wa kũmarutĩra ũira. 
Luke21:14 No rĩrĩ, mũtikanatangĩke mũgĩĩciiria o mbere, ũrĩa mũgeeciirĩrĩra." 
Luke21:15 Nĩgũkorwo nĩngamũhe ciugo na ũũgĩ iria thũ cianyu itakahota gwĩtiiria kana gũkararia. 
Luke21:16 Nĩmũgakunyanĩrwo o na nĩ aciari anyu, na arĩa mũciaranĩirwo nao, na andũ a mbarĩ cianyu, o na arata, na nĩmakooragithia amwe anyu." 
Luke21:17 Andũ othe nĩmakamũmena nĩ ũndũ wakwa. 
Luke21:18 No rĩrĩ, gũtirĩ rũcuĩrĩ o na rũmwe rwa mũtwe wanyu rũkoora." 
Luke21:19 Kũũmĩrĩria kwanyu nĩkuo gũgaatũma mũhonokie mĩoyo yanyu. 
Luke21:20 “Rĩrĩa mũkoona Jerusalemu kũrigiicĩirio nĩ thigari cia mbaara, hĩndĩ ĩyo mũkaamenya atĩ kũniinwo kwarĩo kũrĩ hakuhĩ." 
Luke21:21 Hĩndĩ ĩyo arĩa marĩ Judea nĩmorĩre irĩma-inĩ, na arĩa marĩ thĩinĩ wa itũũra rĩu inene nĩmoime kuo, nao arĩa marĩ ngʼongo-inĩ matikarĩtoonye." 
Luke21:21 Hĩndĩ ĩyo arĩa marĩ Judea nĩmorĩre irĩma-inĩ, na arĩa marĩ thĩinĩ wa itũũra rĩu inene nĩmoime kuo, nao arĩa marĩ ngʼongo-inĩ matikarĩtoonye." 
Luke21:22 Nĩgũkorwo ihinda rĩu nĩrĩo rĩgaakorwo rĩrĩ rĩa kũherithanio, nĩguo maũndũ marĩa mothe mandĩkĩtwo mahingio." 
Luke21:23 Kaĩ atumia arĩa magaakorwo marĩ na nda, na arĩa magaakorwo makĩongithia twana matukũ macio nĩmagathĩĩnĩka-ĩ! Nĩgũkorwo bũrũri ũyũ nĩũkagĩa na kĩnyariirĩko kĩnene na mangʼũrĩ ma gũũkĩrĩra andũ aya." 
Luke21:24 Nĩmakooragwo na rũhiũ rwa njora, o na matahwo matwarwo mabũrũri mothe ma thĩ. Itũũra rĩa Jerusalemu nĩrĩkarangĩrĩrio nĩ andũ-a-Ndũrĩrĩ o nginya mahinda ma andũ-a-Ndũrĩrĩ mahingio." 
Luke21:25 “Na nĩgũkagĩa imenyithia thĩinĩ wa riũa na mweri-inĩ na njata-inĩ. Nakuo gũkũ thĩ, ndũrĩrĩ nĩikaigua ruo na igegio nĩ mũrurumo wa iria na makũmbĩ ma maaĩ makĩhũũrana." 
Luke21:26 Andũ nĩmakaringĩka nĩ ũndũ wa kũmaka, na guoya wa maũndũ marĩa magooka thĩ, nĩgũkorwo maahinya ma igũrũ nĩmakenyenyio." 
Luke21:27 Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩmakona Mũrũ wa Mũndũ agĩũka arĩ thĩinĩ wa itu arĩ na hinya na riiri mũingĩ. 
Luke21:28 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maũndũ macio makaambĩrĩria gwĩkĩka-rĩ, mũkaarũgama mũtiire mĩtwe yanyu na igũrũ, nĩgũkorwo hĩndĩ yanyu ya gũkũũrwo nĩĩkuhĩrĩirie.”" 
Luke21:29 Ningĩ akĩmahe ngerekano ĩno: “Ta rorai mũtĩ wa mũkũyũ na mĩtĩ ĩyo ĩngĩ yothe. 
Luke21:30 Rĩrĩa yathundũra mathangũ, mũmĩonaga na mũkamenya atĩ ihinda rĩa riũa rĩrĩ hakuhĩ." 
Luke21:31 Ũguo noguo hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũkoona maũndũ macio mothe magĩkĩka, mũkaamenya o wega atĩ ũthamaki wa Ngai nĩũkuhĩrĩirie." 
Luke21:32 “Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma, rũciaro rũrũ rũtigathira maũndũ macio mothe matahingĩtio." 
Luke21:33 Igũrũ na thĩ nĩigathira, no ciugo ciakwa itigathira." 
Luke21:34 “Mwĩmenyererei, ngoro cianyu itikanakorwo itahĩtwo nĩ ndĩa, na ũrĩĩu na metanga ma muoyo ũyũ, naguo mũthenya ũcio ũmũkorerere ta mũtego o rĩrĩa mũtangĩĩgereria." 
Luke21:35 Nĩgũkorwo ũndũ ũyũ ũgaakorerera andũ arĩa othe matũũraga thĩ-ĩno. 
Luke21:36 Ikaragai mwĩiguĩte hĩndĩ ciothe, na mũhooyage nĩguo mũkaahota kũũrĩra maũndũ marĩa makiriĩ gwĩkĩka, na nĩguo mũkaahota kũrũgama mbere ya Mũrũ wa Mũndũ.”" 
Luke21:37 Na o mũthenya Jesũ nĩarutanaga hekarũ-inĩ, na hwaĩ-inĩ agathiĩ gũkoma kĩrĩma-inĩ kĩrĩa gĩĩtagwo Kĩrĩma kĩa Mĩtamaiyũ." 
Luke21:38 Nao andũ othe nĩmathiiaga hekarũ-inĩ rũciinĩ tene kũmũthikĩrĩria. 
Luke22:1 Na rĩrĩ, Gĩathĩ kĩa Mĩgate ĩrĩa Ĩtekĩrĩtwo Ndawa ya Kũimbia, kĩrĩa gĩĩtagwo Bathaka, nĩgĩakuhĩrĩirie," 
Luke22:2 nao athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa anene na arutani a watho nĩmacaragia ũrĩa mangĩũragithia Jesũ, nĩgũkorwo nĩmetigagĩra mũingĩ wa andũ." 
Luke22:3 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Shaitani agĩtoonya thĩinĩ wa Judasi ũrĩa Mũisikariota, ũmwe wa arutwo arĩa ikũmi na eerĩ." 
Luke22:4 Nake Judasi agĩthiĩ kũrĩ athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa anene na kũrĩ anene a arangĩri a hekarũ makarĩkanĩre ũrĩa angĩkunyanĩra Jesũ. 
Luke22:5 Nao magĩkena na magĩtĩkĩra kũmũhe mbeeca. 
Luke22:6 Nake agĩĩtĩkĩra, na akĩambĩrĩria gũcaria mweke wa kũneana Jesũ kũrĩ o rĩrĩa hatarĩ na andũ." 
Luke22:7 Naguo mũthenya wa kũrĩa Mĩgate ĩrĩa Ĩtekĩrĩtwo Ndawa ya Kũimbia ũgĩkinya, rĩrĩa gatũrũme ka Bathaka kaarutagwo igongona." 
Luke22:8 Jesũ agĩtũma Petero na Johana, akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Thiĩi mũgatũhaarĩrie irio cia Bathaka, tũrĩe.”" 
Luke22:9 Nao makĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Ũkwenda tũgacihaarĩrie kũ?”" 
Luke22:10 Akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Mũgĩtoonya itũũra-inĩ inene-rĩ, nĩmũgũcemania na mũndũ ũkuuĩte ndigithũ ĩrĩ na maaĩ. Mũmũrũmĩrĩre o nginya nyũmba ĩrĩa egũtoonya." 
Luke22:11 Mwatoonya mwĩre mũndũ ũrĩa mwene nyũmba ĩyo atĩrĩ, ‘Mũrutani aroria atĩrĩ: Nyũmba ya ageni ĩrĩ ha, harĩa ingĩrĩĩra Bathaka na arutwo akwa?’" 
Luke22:12 Nake nĩekũmuonia nyũmba nene ya igũrũ ĩrĩ na indo kuo. Haarĩriai irio cia Bathaka kuo.” 
Luke22:13 Nao magĩthiĩ, magĩkora maũndũ matariĩ o ta ũrĩa Jesũ aamerĩte. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio makĩhaarĩria irio cia Bathaka." 
Luke22:14 Rĩrĩa ihinda rĩakinyire, Jesũ na atũmwo ake magĩikara metha-inĩ." 
Luke22:15 Nake akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Nĩngoretwo ndĩĩrirĩirie mũno kũrĩanĩra Bathaka ĩno na inyuĩ itananyariirwo." 
Luke22:16 Nĩ ũndũ ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ, ndikamĩrĩa rĩngĩ nginya rĩrĩa ĩgaakinyanĩrio ũthamaki-inĩ wa Ngai.”" 
Luke22:17 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩoya gĩkombe, agĩcookeria Ngai ngaatho, akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Oyai, mũnyuanĩre." 
Luke22:18 Nĩgũkorwo ngũmwĩra atĩ kuuma rĩu ndikanyua rĩngĩ ndibei ya maciaro ma mĩthabibũ, o nginya rĩrĩa ũthamaki wa Ngai ũgooka.”" 
Luke22:19 Agĩcooka akĩoya mũgate, na aarĩkia gũcookeria Ngai ngaatho, akĩwenyũranga akĩmahe akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Ũyũ nĩguo mwĩrĩ wakwa ũrĩa ũheanĩtwo nĩ ũndũ wanyu, ĩkagai ũũ nĩguo mũndirikanage.”" 
Luke22:20 Maarĩkia kũrĩa agĩĩka o ũguo, akĩoya gĩkombe, akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Gĩkombe gĩkĩ nĩkĩo kĩrĩkanĩro kĩrĩa kĩerũ thĩinĩ wa thakame yakwa ĩrĩa ĩgũitwo nĩ ũndũ wanyu." 
Luke22:21 No rĩrĩ, guoko kwa ũrĩa ũrĩngunyanĩra kũrĩ hamwe na niĩ metha-inĩ ĩno." 
Luke22:22 Mũrũ wa Mũndũ nĩegwĩkwo o ta ũrĩa gũtuĩtwo, no mũndũ ũrĩa ũkũmũkunyanĩra kaĩ arĩ na haaro-ĩ!”" 
Luke22:23 Nao makĩambĩrĩria kũũrania gatagatĩ-inĩ kao nĩ ũrĩkũ wao ũngĩka ũguo. 
Luke22:24 Ningĩ nĩmagĩire na ngarari makĩũrania nũũ gatagatĩ-inĩ kao ũngĩtuuo mũnene. 
Luke22:25 Nake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Athamaki a andũ-a-Ndũrĩrĩ nĩmenenehagia igũrũ rĩa andũ ao; nao acio maathanaga nĩo meĩĩtaga Ateithania." 
Luke22:26 No inyuĩ mũtiagĩrĩirwo nĩkũhaana ũguo. Handũ ha ũguo, ũrĩa mũnene gatagatĩ-inĩ kanyu agĩrĩirwo kũhaana ta ũrĩa mũnini mũno, nake ũrĩa wathanaga atuĩke ta ũrĩa ũtungataga." 
Luke22:27 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ, nũũ mũnene, nĩ ũrĩa ũikaraga metha-inĩ kũrĩa kana nĩ ũrĩa ũramũtungata? Githĩ ti ũrĩa ũikaraga metha-inĩ? No niĩ ndũire na inyuĩ, haana ta ũrĩa ũmũtungatagĩra." 
Luke22:28 Inyuĩ nĩ inyuĩ mũkoretwo mũrĩ hamwe na niĩ hĩndĩ ya magerio makwa. 
Luke22:29 Na o ta ũrĩa Baba aheete ũthamaki, o na niĩ nĩndamũhe ũthamaki," 
Luke22:30 nĩguo mũkarĩĩagĩra na mũkanyuuagĩra metha-inĩ yakwa ũthamaki-inĩ wakwa, na ningĩ mũikarĩire itĩ-cia-ũnene, mũtuagĩre mĩhĩrĩga ĩrĩa ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ ya Isiraeli ciira." 
Luke22:31 “Simoni, Simoni, atĩrĩ, Shaitani nĩahooete rũtha nĩguo agũthũngũthie o ta ũrĩa ngano ĩthũngũthagio." 
Luke22:32 No wee, Simoni nĩngũhooeire nĩgeetha wĩtĩkio waku ndũgathire. Na warĩkia kũnjookerera, ũũmagĩrĩrie ariũ na aarĩ a thoguo.”" 
Luke22:33 Nowe agĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Mwathani, nĩndĩhaarĩirie gũikio njeera o na gũkuanĩra hamwe nawe.”" 
Luke22:34 Nake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Petero, ngũkwĩra atĩrĩ, ũmũthĩ ngũkũ ĩtanakũga, nĩũrĩngaana maita matatũ uuge atĩ ndũnjũũĩ.”" 
Luke22:35 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Rĩrĩa ndamũtũmire mũtarĩ na kabeti, kana mũhuko, o na kana iraatũ-rĩ, nĩ harĩ kĩndũ mwagire?” Nao magĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Gũtirĩ kĩndũ twagire.”" 
Luke22:36 Nake akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Rĩu akorwo ũrĩ na kabeti kana mũhuko-rĩ, kuua; na akorwo ndũrĩ na rũhiũ rwa njora-rĩ, endia nguo yaku ya igũrũ, ũrũgũre." 
Luke22:37 Na ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ, ũhoro ũrĩa wandĩkĩtwo atĩ, ‘Nĩataranĩirio hamwe na arĩa aagarari watho’ no nginya ũhinge harĩ niĩ. Nĩgũkorwo maũndũ marĩa maandĩkĩtwo igũrũ rĩakwa nĩ hĩndĩ marahinga.”" 
Luke22:38 Nao arutwo makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Mwathani, ta rora haha tũrĩ na hiũ cia njora igĩrĩ.” Nake akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Icio nĩ njiganu.”" 
Luke22:39 Nake Jesũ akiumagara agĩthiĩ Kĩrĩma-inĩ kĩa Mĩtamaiyũ o ta ũrĩa amenyerete gwĩkaga, nao arutwo ake makĩmũrũmĩrĩra." 
Luke22:40 Na aakinya ho akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Hooyai mũtikagwe magerio-inĩ.”" 
Luke22:41 Akĩehera ho, agĩthĩi ta itĩĩna rĩa harĩa mũndũ angĩhota gũikia ihiga, agĩturia ndu akĩhooya," 
Luke22:42 akiuga atĩrĩ, “Baba, ũngĩenda-rĩ, njehereria gĩkombe gĩkĩ; no ti ũrĩa niĩ ngwenda, no nĩ ũrĩa wee ũkwenda.”" 
Luke22:43 Na mũraika akĩmuumĩrĩra oimĩte igũrũ, akĩmuongerera hinya." 
Luke22:44 Nake agĩkĩrĩrĩria kũhooya, arĩ na ruo rũnene ngoro-inĩ, nayo thithino yake yahaanaga ta matata manene ma thakame magĩtaata thĩ." 
Luke22:45 Aatiga kũhooya agĩcooka harĩ arutwo, akĩmakora makomete, moorĩtwo nĩ hinya nĩ kĩeha." 
Luke22:46 Akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Mũkomete nĩkĩ? Ũkĩrai mũhooe nĩgeetha mũtikagwe magerio-inĩ.”" 
Luke22:47 O hĩndĩ ĩyo aragia, hagĩũka gĩkundi kĩa andũ, nake mũndũ ũrĩa wetagwo Judasi, ũmwe wa arutwo arĩa ikũmi na eerĩ, nĩwe wamatongoretie. Agĩkuhĩrĩria Jesũ amũmumunye," 
Luke22:48 nowe Jesũ akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Judasi, ũgũkunyanĩra Mũrũ wa Mũndũ na kũmũmumunya?”" 
Luke22:49 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa arũmĩrĩri a Jesũ monire ũrĩa kwerekeire gwĩkĩka, makĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Mwathani, tũmahũũre na hiũ ciitũ cia njora?”" 
Luke22:50 Nake ũmwe wao agĩtinia gũtũ kwa ũrĩo kwa ndungata ya mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũrĩa mũnene. 
Luke22:51 Nowe Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Ũhoro ũcio nĩũkinye hau!” Agĩcooka akĩhutia gũtũ kwa mũndũ ũcio, akĩmũhonia." 
Luke22:52 Ningĩ Jesũ akĩũria athĩnjĩrĩ-Ngai arĩa anene, na anene a arangĩri a hekarũ, o na athuuri, arĩa mookĩte kũmũnyiita atĩrĩ, “Kaĩ ndĩ mũtongoria wa akararia a watho, atĩ nĩkĩo muoka kũũnyiita mũrĩ na hiũ cia njora na njũgũma?" 
Luke22:53 Ndĩratũũraga na inyuĩ hekarũ-inĩ o mũthenya, na mũtirĩ mwageria kũnyiita. No rĩrĩ, rĩĩrĩ nĩrĩo ithaa rĩanyu, ithaa rĩrĩa wathani wa nduma ũraathana.”" 
Luke22:54 Hĩndĩ ĩyo makĩmũnyiita, makĩmũruta hau makĩmũtwara kwa mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũrĩa mũnene, nake Petero akĩmũrũmĩrĩra arĩ o haraaya." 
Luke22:55 Nao maarĩkia gwakia mwaki o nja gatagatĩ na gũikara thĩ hamwe, Petero nake agĩikara thĩ hamwe nao." 
Luke22:56 Ndungata ĩmwe ya mũirĩtu ĩkĩmuona na ũtheri wa mwaki aikarĩte hau, ĩkĩmũrora wega, ĩkiuga atĩrĩ, “Mũndũ ũyũ oima hamwe nake.”" 
Luke22:57 Nowe agĩkaana ũhoro ũcio, akiuga atĩrĩ, “Mũirĩtu ũyũ, niĩ ndimũũĩ.”" 
Luke22:58 Thuutha wa kahinda kanini mũndũ ũngĩ akĩmuona, akiuga atĩrĩ, “O nawe ũrĩ ũmwe wao.” Petero akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Mũndũ ũyũ, niĩ ndirĩ wao!”" 
Luke22:59 Thuutha wa ithaa rĩmwe, mũndũ ũngĩ akiuga agwatĩirie atĩrĩ, “Hatirĩ nganja mũndũ ũyũ moima hamwe nake, nĩgũkorwo o nake nĩ Mũgalili.”" 
Luke22:60 Petero agĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Mũndũ ũyũ, niĩ ndiũĩ ũrĩa ũroiga!” Na hĩndĩ o ĩyo oigaga ũguo, ngũkũ ĩgĩkũga." 
Luke22:61 Mwathani akĩĩhũgũra akĩrora Petero. Nake Petero akĩririkana ũrĩa Mwathani aamwĩrĩte atĩ, “Ũmũthĩ ngũkũ ĩtanakũga nĩũrĩngaana maita matatũ.”" 
Luke22:62 Nake agĩthiĩ nja, akĩrĩra arĩ na ruo rũingĩ." 
Luke22:63 Andũ arĩa maarangĩrĩte Jesũ makĩambĩrĩria kũmũnyũrũria makĩmũhũũraga. 
Luke22:64 Makĩmuoha maitho na gĩtambaya makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Toiga nũũ wakũgũtha.”" 
Luke22:65 Na nĩmamwĩrire maũndũ mangĩ maingĩ ma kũmũruma. 
Luke22:66 Rũciinĩ gwakĩa, kĩama gĩa athuuri arĩa atongoria a andũ, hamwe na athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa anene, na arutani a watho, gĩgĩcemania, nake Jesũ akĩrehwo mbere yao." 
Luke22:67 Makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Akorwo nĩwe Kristũ, twĩre.” Nake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Ingĩmwĩra, mũtingĩnjĩtĩkia," 
Luke22:68 na ingĩmũũria kĩũria, mũtingĩnjokeria." 
Luke22:69 No kuuma rĩu, Mũrũ wa Mũndũ arĩkoragwo aikarĩte guoko-inĩ kwa ũrĩo kwa Ngai ũrĩa Mwene-Hinya.”" 
Luke22:70 Othe makĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Wee ũkĩrĩ Mũrũ wa Ngai?” Nake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Nĩmwamenya nĩ kuuga atĩ nĩ niĩ we.”" 
Luke22:71 Makĩũria atĩrĩ, “Tũgũkĩenda ũira ũngĩ wakĩ? Nĩtweiguĩra ũhoro kuuma kanua gake mwene.”" 
Luke23:1 Hĩndĩ ĩyo kĩũngano kĩu gĩothe gĩgĩũkĩra, gĩkĩmũtwara kũrĩ Pilato." 
Luke23:2 Nakĩo gĩkĩambĩrĩria kũmũthitanga gĩkiuga atĩrĩ, “Nĩtuonete mũndũ ũyũ akĩhĩtithia rũrĩrĩ rwitũ. Nĩakararagia ũhoro wa kũrutĩra Kaisari igooti na agetuaga atĩ nĩwe Kristũ, na nĩ mũthamaki.”" 
Luke23:3 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Pilato akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Wee nĩwe mũthamaki wa Ayahudi?” Nake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Ĩĩ, ũguo woiga nĩguo.”" 
Luke23:4 Nake Pilato akĩĩra athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa anene na andũ acio angĩ atĩrĩ, “Ndikuona ũndũ ingĩthitangĩra mũndũ ũyũ.”" 
Luke23:5 Nao magĩthiĩ na mbere kuuga magwatĩirie atĩrĩ, “Nĩatũmĩte andũ mookanĩrĩre Judea guothe nĩ ũndũ wa ũrutani wake. Aambĩrĩirie Galili na nĩokĩte nginya o gũkũ.”" 
Luke23:5 Nao magĩthiĩ na mbere kuuga magwatĩirie atĩrĩ, “Nĩatũmĩte andũ mookanĩrĩre Judea guothe nĩ ũndũ wa ũrutani wake. Aambĩrĩirie Galili na nĩokĩte nginya o gũkũ.”" 
Luke23:6 Pilato aigua ũguo, akĩũria kana mũndũ ũcio nĩ wa kuuma Galili." 
Luke23:7 Rĩrĩa aamenyire atĩ Jesũ aarĩ wa bũrũri ũrĩa wathanagwo nĩ Herode, akiuga atwarwo kũrĩ Herode, ũrĩa wakoretwo arĩ Jerusalemu ihinda-inĩ rĩu." 
Luke23:8 Rĩrĩa Herode oonire Jesũ, nĩakenire mũno, tondũ kwa ihinda iraaya nĩakoretwo akĩenda kũmuona. Kũringana na ũrĩa aiguĩte ũhoro wake, aarĩ na mwĩhoko wa kũmuona akĩringa ciama." 
Luke23:9 Akĩũria Jesũ ciũria nyingĩ, nowe Jesũ ndaigana kũmũcookeria o na kĩmwe." 
Luke23:10 Nao athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa anene na arutani a watho maarũgamĩte hau, makĩmũthitanga magwatĩirie mũno." 
Luke23:11 Nake Herode na thigari ciake makĩmũthekerera na makĩmũnyũrũria. Makĩmũhumba nguo yarĩ thaka, na makĩmũcookia kũrĩ Pilato." 
Luke23:12 Nao Herode na Pilato magĩtuma ũrata mũthenya ũcio, tondũ mbere ĩyo maatũũrĩte marĩ ũthũ." 
Luke23:13 Pilato agĩĩta athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa anene, na aathani, na andũ hamwe," 
Luke23:14 akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Mũndeheire mũndũ ũyũ atĩ nĩ mũndũ ũhĩtithagia andũ. Na niĩ ndatuĩria ũhoro wake mũrĩ ho, no ndirĩ ũndũ mũũru ndoona wa maũndũ marĩa mũmũthitangĩire." 
Luke23:15 O nake Herode ndanamuona arĩ na mahĩtia, nĩgũkorwo nĩamũcookia kũrĩ ithuĩ; nĩ ũndũ ũcio, ndarĩ ũndũ ekĩte wa gũtũma ooragwo." 
Luke23:16 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngũmũhũũrithia, njooke ndĩmũrekererie.” (" 
Luke23:17 Nĩgũkorwo, kwarĩ mũtugo amohorere mũndũ ũmwe hĩndĩ ĩyo ya Iruga.)" 
Luke23:18 No andũ acio makĩanĩrĩra na mũgambo ũmwe, makiuga atĩrĩ, “Twehererie mũndũ ũyũ! Tuohorere Baraba!” (" 
Luke23:19 Baraba aikĩtio njeera nĩ ũndũ wa kũrutithia ngũĩ itũũra-inĩ rĩu inene, na nĩ ũndũ wa kũũragana.)" 
Luke23:20 Nake Pilato, tondũ nĩeendaga kũrekereria Jesũ, akĩmaarĩria o rĩngĩ." 
Luke23:21 No-o magĩthiĩ na mbere kwanĩrĩra, makiugaga atĩrĩ, “Mwambe mũtĩ-igũrũ! Mwambe mũtĩ-igũrũ!”" 
Luke23:22 Nake akĩmooria riita rĩa gatatũ atĩrĩ, “Nĩkĩ? Nĩ ũũru ũrĩkũ mũndũ ũyũ eekĩte? Ndionete gĩtũmi gĩa gũtũma ooragwo. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngũmũhũũrithia, njooke ndĩmuohore.”" 
Luke23:23 No-o makĩanĩrĩra mategũtigithĩria makiugaga aambwo mũtĩ-igũrũ, nayo mĩgambo ĩyo yao ĩkĩhootana." 
Luke23:24 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Pilato agĩtua nĩekũmahingĩria o ũguo moorĩtie. 
Luke23:25 Akĩohora mũndũ ũcio waikĩtio njeera nĩ ũndũ wa kũrutithia ngũĩ na kũũragana, o ũcio moigĩte mohorerwo, nake Pilato akĩneana Jesũ ekwo kũringana na ũrĩa mendaga." 
Luke23:26 Na rĩrĩa thigari cioimagaragia Jesũ, ikĩnyiita mũndũ woimaga mĩgũnda-inĩ wetagwo Simoni wa kuuma Kurene. Nacio ikĩmũigĩrĩra mũtharaba wa Jesũ aũkuue na amuume thuutha." 
Luke23:27 Andũ gĩkundi kĩnene makĩmũrũmĩrĩra, hamwe na atumia maagirĩkaga na makarĩra mũno." 
Luke23:28 Nake Jesũ akĩĩhũgũra na kũrĩ o, akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Inyuĩ aarĩ a Jerusalemu, tigai kũndĩrĩra; mwĩrĩrĩrei inyuĩ ene na ciana cianyu." 
Luke23:29 Nĩgũkorwo kũrĩ hĩndĩ ĩgooka rĩrĩa mũkoigaga atĩrĩ, ‘Kũrathimwo-rĩ, nĩ atumia arĩa thaata, na nda iria itarĩ ciaciara, o na nyondo iria itarĩ ciongwo!’" 
Luke23:30 Hĩndĩ ĩyo “ ‘nĩmakeera irĩma atĩrĩ, “Tũgwĩrei!” o na macooke meere tũrĩma atĩrĩ, “Tũhumbĩrei!” ’" 
Luke23:31 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ, andũ mangĩkorwo nĩmareeka maũndũ maya rĩrĩa mũtĩ ũrĩ mũigũ-rĩ, gũgakĩhaana atĩa woma?”" 
Luke23:32 Na rĩrĩ, andũ angĩ eerĩ ageri ngero, o nao nĩmatwarirwo hamwe nake makooragwo." 
Luke23:33 Rĩrĩa maakinyire karĩma-inĩ handũ heetagwo Ihĩndĩ-rĩa-Mũtwe, makĩmwamba ho hamwe na ageri ngero acio, ũmwe mwena wake wa ũrĩo, na ũrĩa ũngĩ mwena wake wa ũmotho." 
Luke23:34 Nake Jesũ akiuga atĩrĩ, “Baba mohere, nĩgũkorwo matiũĩ ũrĩa mareeka.” Nao magĩcuukĩra nguo ciake mĩtĩ, magĩcigayana." 
Luke23:35 Nao andũ nĩmarũgamĩte hau makĩmwĩrorera: Nao anene nĩmamũnyũrũragia makoiga atĩrĩ, “Nĩarahonokagia andũ arĩa angĩ, nĩehonokie aakorwo nĩwe Kristũ wa Ngai, Ũrĩa wake Mũthuure.”" 
Luke23:36 Thigari o nacio igĩũka, ikĩmũnyũrũria. Ikĩmũkundia thiki," 
Luke23:37 ikĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Akorwo nĩwe Mũthamaki wa Ayahudi, wĩhonokie.”" 
Luke23:38 Na nĩ haarĩ maandĩko maandĩkĩtwo igũrũ rĩake atĩrĩ: ŨYŨ NĨWE MŨTHAMAKI WA AYAHUDI. 
Luke23:39 Ũmwe wa ageri ngero acio maambanĩirio nake akĩmũruma, akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Githĩ wee tiwe Kristũ? Wĩhonokie, na ũtũhonokie!”" 
Luke23:40 No mũgeri ngero ũcio ũngĩ akĩmũkaania, akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Ndũngĩĩtigĩra Ngai, kuona atĩ ũtuĩrĩirwo o ũrĩa atuĩrĩirwo?" 
Luke23:41 Ithuĩ tũherithĩtio na kĩhooto, nĩgũkorwo tũraherithĩrio ũrĩa twĩkĩte. No rĩrĩ, mũndũ ũyũ ndarĩ ũndũ mũũru ekĩte.”" 
Luke23:42 Agĩcooka akĩĩra Jesũ atĩrĩ, “Ĩtĩkĩra gũkandirikana rĩrĩa ũgooka ũthamaki-inĩ waku.”" 
Luke23:43 Nake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Ngũkwĩra na ma, ũmũthĩ nĩũrĩkorwo hamwe na niĩ ikenero.”" 
Luke23:44 Na rĩrĩ, kwarĩ ta thaa thita cia mũthenya, naguo bũrũri wothe ũkĩgĩa nduma nginya thaa kenda," 
Luke23:45 tondũ riũa nĩrĩatigire kwara. Nakĩo gĩtambaya kĩa hekarũ gĩgĩatũkana maita meerĩ. 
Luke23:46 Nake Jesũ akĩanĩrĩra na mũgambo mũnene, akiuga atĩrĩ, “Baba, roho wakwa ndaũiga moko-inĩ maku.” Aarĩkia kuuga ũguo, agĩtuĩkana." 
Luke23:47 Rĩrĩa mũnene wa gĩkundi gĩa thigari igana oonire ũrĩa gwekĩka, akĩgooca Ngai, akiuga atĩrĩ, “Ti-itheru ũyũ oima mũndũ mũthingu.”" 
Luke23:48 Rĩrĩa andũ arĩa othe maarũgamĩte hau kwĩrorera moonire ũrĩa gwekĩka, makĩinũka methikĩire, na makĩĩhũũraga ithũri nĩ kĩeha." 
Luke23:49 No arĩa othe maamũũĩ, o hamwe na atumia arĩa maamũrũmĩrĩire kuuma Galili, makĩrũgama o haraaya, meroreire maũndũ macio." 
Luke23:50 Na rĩrĩ, nĩ haarĩ na mũndũ wetagwo Jusufu, mũthuuri wa Kĩama, na aarĩ mũndũ mwega na mũrũngĩrĩru," 
Luke23:51 nake ndetĩkanĩtie na ũguo maatuĩte na mageeka. Oimĩte itũũra rĩa Arimathea, bũrũri wa Judea, na nĩetagĩrĩra ũthamaki wa Ngai." 
Luke23:51 nake ndetĩkanĩtie na ũguo maatuĩte na mageeka. Oimĩte itũũra rĩa Arimathea, bũrũri wa Judea, na nĩetagĩrĩra ũthamaki wa Ngai." 
Luke23:52 Nake agĩthiĩ kũrĩ Pilato, akĩhooya etĩkĩrio akuue mwĩrĩ wa Jesũ." 
Luke23:53 Nake agĩcuurũria mwĩrĩ wa Jesũ mũtharaba-inĩ, akĩũkũnja na taama wa gatani, agĩcooka akĩũiga thĩinĩ wa mbĩrĩra yenjetwo rwaro-inĩ rwa ihiga, nayo ndĩakoretwo ĩigĩtwo mũndũ." 
Luke23:54 Na mũthenya ũcio warĩ wa Ihaarĩria, nayo Thabatũ yarĩ hakuhĩ kwambĩrĩria." 
Luke23:55 Nao atumia arĩa moimĩte na Jesũ Galili makĩrũmĩrĩra Jusufu, makĩona mbĩrĩra na makĩona ũrĩa mwĩrĩ wake waigirwo ho." 
Luke23:56 Magĩcooka makĩinũka, makĩhaarĩria mahuti manungi wega na maguta manungi wega. No rĩrĩ, mũthenya wa Thabatũ makĩhurũka kũringana na ũrĩa gwathanĩtwo." 
Luke24:1 Na rĩrĩ, mũthenya wa kwambĩrĩria kiumia, rũciinĩ tene, atumia magĩthiĩ mbĩrĩra-inĩ makuuĩte indo nungi wega iria maathondekete." 
Luke24:2 Nao magĩkora ihiga rĩgaragarĩtio rĩkeherio mũromo-inĩ wa mbĩrĩra," 
Luke24:3 no rĩrĩa maatoonyire, matiigana gũkora mwĩrĩ wa Mwathani Jesũ." 
Luke24:4 Na rĩrĩa maagegete nĩ ũhoro ũcio, makiumĩrĩrwo o rĩmwe nĩ arũme eerĩ mehumbĩte nguo njerũ ciakengaga mũno, makĩrũgama hakuhĩ nao." 
Luke24:5 Nao atumia acio metigĩrĩte mũno, makĩinamĩrĩra, magĩturumithia mothiũ mao thĩ, no arũme acio makĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Mũracaria ũrĩa ũrĩ muoyo kũrĩ arĩa akuũ nĩkĩ?" 
Luke24:6 Ndarĩ haha; nĩariũkĩte! Ririkanai ũrĩa aamwĩrire hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aarĩ na inyuĩ Galili atĩ: 
Luke24:7 ‘Mũrũ wa Mũndũ no nginya aneanwo moko-inĩ ma andũ ehia, aambwo mũtĩ-igũrũ, na mũthenya wa gatatũ ariũke.’ ”" 
Luke24:8 Hĩndĩ ĩyo makĩririkana ciugo ciake. 
Luke24:9 Na rĩrĩ, maacooka kuuma mbĩrĩra-inĩ, makĩhe arutwo arĩa ikũmi na ũmwe na arĩa angĩ othe ũhoro ũcio." 
Luke24:10 Mariamu Mũmagidali, na Joana, na Mariamu nyina wa Jakubu, na atumia arĩa angĩ maarĩ nao, nĩo meerire atũmwo ũhoro ũcio." 
Luke24:11 No-o matiigana gwĩtĩkia atumia acio, tondũ ũhoro ũcio wahaanaga ta ũrimũ kũrĩ o." 
Luke24:12 No rĩrĩ, Petero agĩũkĩra, agĩtengʼera mbĩrĩra-inĩ. Na ainamĩrĩra akĩona mataama ma gatani maigĩtwo thĩ marĩ moiki, agĩĩthiĩra agegearĩte nĩ ũndũ wa ũguo gwekĩkĩte." 
Luke24:13 Na rĩrĩ, mũthenya o ro ũcio arutwo eerĩ a Jesũ maarĩ rũgendo-inĩ magĩthiĩ itũũra rĩetagwo Emau, rĩarĩ ta kilomita ikũmi kuuma Jerusalemu." 
Luke24:14 Nao nĩmaragia ũhoro wa maũndũ marĩa mothe meekĩkĩte. 
Luke24:15 Na rĩrĩa maathiiaga makĩaragia ũhoro ũcio, Jesũ akĩmoimĩrĩra, agĩtwarana nao;" 
Luke24:16 no matiigana kũrekwo mamũmenye. 
Luke24:17 Nake akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Nĩ ũhoro ũrĩkũ ũcio mũrathiĩ mũkĩaragia?” Nao makĩrũgama matukĩte mothiũ." 
Luke24:18 Ũmwe wao, wetagwo Kileopa akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Wee kaĩ ũrĩ mũgeni Jerusalemu ũtamenyete maũndũ marĩa mekĩkĩte kuo matukũ-inĩ maya?”" 
Luke24:19 Nake akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Nĩ maũndũ marĩkũ?” Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Nĩ ũhoro wa Jesũ wa Nazarethi, ũrĩa ũraarĩ mũnabii ũrĩ na ũhoti wa ciugo iria araaragia na ciĩko iria areekaga arĩ mbere ya Ngai o na mbere ya andũ othe." 
Luke24:20 Athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa anene na aathani aitũ maramũneanire atuĩrwo kũũragwo, na maramwambithia mũtĩ-igũrũ." 
Luke24:21 No ithuĩ-rĩ, tũrehokaga atĩ ũcio nĩwe ũgũkũũra andũ Isiraeli. Makĩria ma ũguo, rĩu nĩ mũthenya wa ĩtatũ kuuma maũndũ maya mothe mekĩka." 
Luke24:22 Hamwe na ũguo atumia amwe aitũ nĩmatũmakirie mũno tondũ megũthiĩte mbĩrĩra-inĩ rũciinĩ tene," 
Luke24:23 no matinona mwĩrĩ wake. Mokire matwĩra atĩ nĩmonire kĩoneki kĩa araika, arĩa mameerire atĩ arĩ muoyo." 
Luke24:24 Nao amwe a thiritũ iitũ nĩmathiire mbĩrĩra-inĩ, na makora o ũguo atumia acio mekuugĩte, no rĩrĩ, we mwene matinamuona.”" 
Luke24:25 Nake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Inyuĩ andũ aya mwagĩte ũũgĩ na mũtihiũhaga gwĩtĩkia maũndũ mothe marĩa anabii moigĩte!" 
Luke24:26 Githĩ to mũhaka Kristũ ambe anyariirwo na acooke atoonye riiri-inĩ wake?” 
Luke24:27 Jesũ akĩmataarĩria ũhoro wothe ũrĩa waarĩtio Maandĩko-inĩ ũmũkoniĩ, ambĩrĩirie na maandĩko ma Musa na ma Anabii othe." 
Luke24:28 Na maakuhĩrĩria itũũra rĩrĩa maathiiaga, Jesũ agĩtua taarĩ kũhĩtũka arahĩtũka." 
Luke24:29 No makĩmũringĩrĩria na hinya, makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Raarĩrĩra gũkũ na ithuĩ, nĩkũratuka na gũkiriĩ kũgĩa nduma.” Nĩ ũndũ ũcio agĩtoonya aikaranie nao." 
Luke24:30 Rĩrĩa aikarire metha-inĩ hamwe nao, akĩoya mũgate, agĩcookia ngaatho, akĩwenyũranga, akĩmahe." 
Luke24:31 Hĩndĩ ĩyo makĩhingũka maitho, makĩmũmenya, nake akĩbuĩria, makĩaga kũmuona rĩngĩ." 
Luke24:32 Nao makĩũrania atĩrĩ, “Githĩ ngoro ciitũ itiikũhĩahĩaga hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ekwaragia na ithuĩ njĩra-inĩ, na agĩtũtaarĩria ũrĩa Maandĩko moigĩte?”" 
Luke24:33 Nao magĩũkĩra o hĩndĩ ĩyo magĩcooka Jerusalemu. Kũu magĩkora arutwo arĩa ikũmi na ũmwe, hamwe na arĩa maarĩ nao monganĩte," 
Luke24:34 makiugaga atĩrĩ, “Nĩ ma! Mwathani nĩariũkĩte na nĩoimĩrĩire Simoni.”" 
Luke24:35 Hĩndĩ ĩyo acio eerĩ makĩmeera maũndũ marĩa meekĩkĩte marĩ njĩra-inĩ, na ũrĩa maamenyire Jesũ hĩndĩ ĩrĩa eenyũrire mũgate." 
Luke24:36 O makĩaragia ũhoro ũcio, Jesũ akĩrũgama gatagatĩ kao akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Thayũ ũrogĩa na inyuĩ.”" 
Luke24:37 Nao makĩhahũka na makĩmaka, magĩĩciiria atĩ nĩ ngoma moonaga." 
Luke24:38 Nake akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Mũratangĩka nĩkĩ, na nĩ kĩĩ gĩgũtũma mũgĩe na nganja meciiria-inĩ manyu?" 
Luke24:39 Ta rorai moko makwa na nyarĩrĩ ciakwa. Nĩ niĩ mwene! Huutiai muone; roho ndũrĩ nyama na mahĩndĩ, ta ũrĩa mũrona ndĩ nacio.”" 
Luke24:40 Aarĩkia kuuga ũguo, akĩmoonia moko make na nyarĩrĩ ciake." 
Luke24:41 Nao magĩkorwo matarĩ maretĩkia nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa makenete na makagega. Nake akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Mũrĩ na kĩndũ gĩa kũrĩa?”" 
Luke24:42 Nao makĩmũnengera gĩcunjĩ gĩa thamaki hĩu. 
Luke24:43 Nake agĩkĩoya, akĩrĩa makĩĩonagĩra." 
Luke24:44 Akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Ũũ nĩguo ndamwĩrire hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ndaarĩ na inyuĩ atĩ: Maũndũ mothe marĩa mandĩkĩtwo ũhoro wakwa Watho-inĩ wa Musa, na Maandĩko-inĩ ma Anabii, na Thaburi, no nginya mahingio.”" 
Luke24:45 Hĩndĩ ĩyo akĩhingũra meciiria mao nĩguo mamenye Maandĩko. 
Luke24:46 Akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Ũũ nĩguo kwandĩkĩtwo: Kristũ nĩakanyariirwo na ariũkio kuuma kũrĩ arĩa akuũ mũthenya wa gatatũ," 
Luke24:47 naguo ũhoro wa kwĩrira na kũrekerwo kwa mehia ũkaahunjĩrio ndũrĩrĩ ciothe thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩake, wambĩrĩirie Jerusalemu." 
Luke24:48 Inyuĩ mũrĩ aira a maũndũ macio. 
Luke24:49 Na rĩrĩ, nĩngũmũtũmĩra kĩrĩa Baba eranĩire; no ikarai thĩinĩ wa itũũra rĩĩrĩ inene nginya rĩrĩa mũkaaheo hinya kuuma Igũrũ.”" 
Luke24:50 Agĩcooka akĩmatongoria kuuma kũu magĩthiĩ magĩkinya hakuhĩ na Bethania; akĩoya moko na igũrũ, akĩmarathima." 
Luke24:51 Na o akĩmarathimaga, akĩmatiga, akĩiyũkio akĩambata igũrũ." 
Luke24:52 Nao makĩmũgooca na magĩcooka Jerusalemu makenete mũno. 
Luke24:53 Nao nĩmaikaraga hekarũ-inĩ mahinda mothe makĩgoocaga Ngai. 
John1:1 Kĩambĩrĩria-inĩ Ũhoro aarĩ o kuo, nake Ũhoro aatũũrĩte na Ngai, na Ũhoro aarĩ Ngai." 
John1:2 We aatũũrĩte na Ngai kuuma o kĩambĩrĩria. 
John1:3 Indo ciothe ciombirwo na ũndũ wake; gũtirĩ kĩndũ kĩa iria ciombirwo kĩagĩire atarĩ ho. 
John1:4 Thĩinĩ wake kwarĩ muoyo, naguo muoyo ũcio nĩguo warĩ ũtheri wa andũ." 
John1:5 Ũtheri ũcio nĩũtheraga nduma-inĩ, nayo nduma ndĩigana kũũhoota." 
John1:6 Nĩguokire mũndũ watũmĩtwo nĩ Ngai; eetagwo Johana. 
John1:7 We okire arĩ mũira oimbũre ũhoro ũkoniĩ ũtheri ũcio, nĩgeetha andũ othe metĩkie nĩ ũndũ wake." 
John1:8 We mwene tiwe warĩ ũtheri ũcio, no okire arĩ o ta mũira tu nĩgeetha oimbũre ũhoro wa ũtheri ũcio." 
John1:9 Ũtheri ũcio wa ma, ũrĩa ũtheragĩra o mũndũ o wothe, nĩwokaga thĩ." 
John1:10 We Ũhoro aarĩ gũkũ thĩ, no o na gũtuĩka thĩ yombirwo na ũndũ wake-rĩ, andũ a thĩ matiigana kũmũmenya." 
John1:11 Okire gwake mwene, no andũ ake mwene matiigana kũmwĩtĩkĩra." 
John1:12 No andũ arĩa othe maamwĩtĩkĩrire, o acio metĩkirie rĩĩtwa rĩake, nĩamahotithirie gũtuĩka ciana cia Ngai" 
John1:13 ciana itaciarĩtwo nĩ thakame, kana igaciarwo nĩ kwenda kwa mwĩrĩ kana kwenda kwa mũndũ, no iciarĩtwo nĩ kwenda kwa Ngai." 
John1:14 We Kiugo agĩtuĩka mũndũ na agĩtũũrania na ithuĩ. Nĩtuonete riiri wake, riiri wa Mũrũ wake wa Mũmwe, ũrĩa woimire kũrĩ Ithe aiyũrĩtwo nĩ ũtugi na ũhoro wa ma." 
John1:15 Johana nĩoimbũraga ũhoro wake. Aanagĩrĩra akoiga atĩrĩ, “Ũyũ nĩwe ũrĩa ndaaragia ũhoro wake ngiuga atĩrĩ, ‘Ũrĩa ũgũũka thuutha wakwa nĩ mũnene kũngĩra, tondũ aarĩ mbere yakwa.’ ”" 
John1:16 Na kuuma ũiyũrĩrĩru wa ũtugi wake-rĩ, ithuothe nĩtwamũkĩrĩte irathimo nyingĩ mũno." 
John1:17 Tondũ watho wokire na Musa, no ũtugi na ũhoro ũrĩa wa ma ciokire na Jesũ Kristũ." 
John1:18 Gũtirĩ mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ ũrĩ ona Ngai, o tiga Mũrũ wake wa Mũmwe ũrĩa ũikarĩte hamwe na Ithe, na nĩwe ũtũmĩte amenyeke." 
John1:19 Na rĩrĩ, ũyũ nĩguo ũira wa Johana hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Ayahudi a Jerusalemu maamũtũmĩire athĩnjĩri-Ngai na Alawii makamũũrie we aarĩ ũ." 
John1:20 We ndaagire kuumbũra, no oimbũrire atekũhitha, akiuga atĩrĩ, “Niĩ ti niĩ Kristũ.”" 
John1:21 Nao makĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Wee ũkĩrĩ ũ? Wee nĩwe Elija?” Nake akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Aca, ti niĩ.” Ningĩ makĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Nĩwe Mũnabii ũrĩa?” Nake agĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Aca.”" 
John1:22 Mũthia-inĩ makĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Wee ũkĩrĩ ũ? Tũhe macookio nĩguo tũcookerie arĩa matũtũmire. Ũkuuga atĩa ha ũhoro waku mwene?”" 
John1:23 Johana akĩmacookeria na ciugo iria ciarĩtio nĩ mũnabii Isaia, akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Niĩ ndĩ mũgambo wa mũndũ ũranĩrĩra werũ-inĩ akoiga atĩrĩ, ‘Rũngariai njĩra ya Mwathani.’ ”" 
John1:24 Na rĩrĩ, Afarisai amwe arĩa maatũmĩtwo" 
John1:25 makĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Angĩkorwo we tiwe Kristũ, na tiwe Elija, o na kana Mũnabii ũrĩa-rĩ, ũkĩbatithanagia nĩkĩ?”" 
John1:26 Nake Johana akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Niĩ ndĩmũbatithagia na maaĩ. No gatagatĩ-inĩ kanyu nĩ harĩ na ũmwe mũtooĩ." 
John1:27 Ũcio nĩwe ũgũũka thuutha wakwa, o we ũrĩa itaagĩrĩire kuohora ndigi cia iraatũ ciake.”" 
John1:28 Maũndũ maya mothe mekĩkire itũũra-inĩ rĩa Bethania, mũrĩmo wa Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani, kũrĩa Johana aabatithanagĩria." 
John1:29 Mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ, Johana akĩona Jesũ agĩũka na kũrĩ we, akiuga atĩrĩ, “Onei! Gatũrũme ka Ngai karĩa keheragia mehia ma kĩrĩndĩ!" 
John1:30 Ũyũ nĩwe ndaaragia ũhoro wake rĩrĩa ndoigire atĩrĩ, ‘Mũndũ ũrĩa ũgũũka thuutha wakwa nĩ mũnene kũrĩ niĩ tondũ we aarĩ kuo mbere yakwa.’" 
John1:31 Niĩ mwene ndiamũũĩ, no ndokire ngĩbatithanagia na maaĩ nĩgeetha aguũrĩrio andũ a Isiraeli.”" 
John1:32 Ningĩ Johana akĩheana ũira ũyũ: “Nĩndonire Roho agĩikũrũka kuuma igũrũ atariĩ ta ndutura, agĩikara igũrũ rĩake." 
John1:33 Niĩ ndingĩamũmenyire, tiga ũrĩa wandũmire mbatithanagie na maaĩ aanjĩĩrire atĩrĩ, ‘Mũndũ ũrĩa ũkoona Roho agĩikũrũkĩra na aikare igũrũ rĩake-rĩ, ũcio nĩwe ũkaabatithanagia na Roho Mũtheru.’" 
John1:34 Niĩ nĩnyonete ũguo na ngoimbũra atĩ ũyũ nĩwe Mũrũ wa Ngai.” 
John1:35 Ningĩ mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ, Johana agĩkorwo arĩ kũu o rĩngĩ marĩ na arutwo ake eerĩ." 
John1:36 Na rĩrĩa onire Jesũ akĩhĩtũka, akiuga atĩrĩ, “Onei Gatũrũme ka Ngai!”" 
John1:37 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa arutwo acio eerĩ maiguire oiga ũguo, makĩrũmĩrĩra Jesũ." 
John1:38 Jesũ ehũgũra akĩmoona mamumĩte thuutha, akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Nĩ atĩa mũrenda?” Nao makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Rabii” (ũguo nĩ kuuga Mũrutani), “ũikaraga kũ?”" 
John1:39 Nake akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Ũkai na nĩmũkuona.” Nĩ ũndũ ũcio magĩthiĩ makĩona kũrĩa aikaraga, na magĩikara nake mũthenya ũcio. Na kwarĩ ta thaa ikũmi." 
John1:40 Na rĩrĩ, ũmwe wa arutwo acio eerĩ arĩa maiguĩte ũrĩa Johana oigĩte na makĩrũmĩrĩra Jesũ aarĩ Anderea, mũrũ wa nyina na Simoni Petero." 
John1:41 Ũndũ wa mbere ũrĩa Anderea eekire nĩgũcaria mũrũ wa nyina Simoni, na kũmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Nĩtuonete Mesia” (nĩwe Kristũ)." 
John1:42 Nake akĩmũtwara kũrĩ Jesũ. Nake Jesũ akĩmũrora, akiuga atĩrĩ, “Wee nĩwe Simoni mũrũ wa Johana. Ũgũcooka gwĩtwo Kefa” (na rĩo rĩgĩtaũrwo nĩ kuuga Petero)." 
John1:43 Mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ Jesũ agĩtua itua rĩa gũthiĩ Galili. Agĩkora Filipu, akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Nũmĩrĩra.”" 
John1:44 Filipu, o ta Petero na Anderea, aarĩ wa itũũra rĩa Bethisaida." 
John1:45 Filipu agĩkora Nathanieli, akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Nĩtuonete mũndũ ũrĩa Musa aandĩkire ũhoro wake Ibuku-inĩ rĩa Watho, na nowe anabii maandĩkire ũhoro wake, nake nĩwe Jesũ wa Nazarethi, mũrũ wa Jusufu.”" 
John1:46 Nake Nathanieli akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Kũrĩ kĩndũ kĩega kĩngiuma Nazarethi?” Nake Filipu akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Ũka ũkoone.”" 
John1:47 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Jesũ onire Nathanieli agĩũka kũrĩ we, akĩaria ũhoro wake, akiuga atĩrĩ, “Onei Mũisiraeli kũna ũtarĩ ũhinga.”" 
John1:48 Nake Nathanieli akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Ũnjũũĩ atĩa?” Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Nĩngũkuonete o na rĩrĩa uuma rungu rwa mũkũyũ, Filipu atanagwĩta.”" 
John1:49 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Nathanieli akiuga atĩrĩ, “Rabii, wee nĩwe Mũrũ wa Ngai; wee nĩwe Mũthamaki wa Isiraeli.”" 
John1:50 Nake Jesũ akiuga atĩrĩ, “Wetĩkia tondũ nĩndakwĩra atĩ nĩnguonire ũrĩ rungu rwa mũkũyũ. Nĩũkuona maũndũ manene kũrĩ macio.”" 
John1:51 Ningĩ akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma, nĩmũkona igũrũ rĩhingũkĩte na araika a Ngai makĩambata na magĩikũrũka, harĩ Mũrũ wa Mũndũ.”" 
John2:1 Na rĩrĩ, mũthenya wa gatatũ nĩ kwagĩire na kihikanio kũu Kana ya Galili. Nyina wa Jesũ aarĩ kuo," 
John2:2 nake Jesũ na arutwo ake o nao nĩmetĩtwo kĩhikanio-inĩ kĩu. 
John2:3 Rĩrĩa ndibei yathirire, nyina wa Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Matirĩ na ndibei ĩngĩ.”" 
John2:4 Nake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Mũtumia ũyũ, ndĩ na ũhoro ũrĩkũ nawe? Ihinda rĩakwa rĩtirĩ rĩrakinya.”" 
John2:5 Nake nyina akĩĩra ndungata atĩrĩ, “Ĩkai ũrĩa wothe ekũmwĩra.”" 
John2:6 Hau hakuhĩ nao nĩ haarĩ na ndigithũ ithathatũ cia maaĩ ciathondeketwo na ihiga, mũthemba ũrĩa wahũthagĩrwo nĩ Ayahudi magongona-inĩ mao ma gwĩtheria, na o ĩmwe yaiyũragio nĩ ngeereni kuuma mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ nginya mĩrongo ĩtatũ." 
John2:7 Nake Jesũ akĩĩra ndungata icio atĩrĩ, “Iyũriai ndigithũ maaĩ”; nacio ikĩiyũria riita." 
John2:8 Agĩcooka agĩciĩra atĩrĩ, “Rĩu tahiai ĩmwe mũtwarĩre mũtabania wa iruga.” Nacio igĩĩka o ũguo," 
John2:9 nake mũtabania wa iruga agĩcama maaĩ macio maagarũrĩtwo magatuĩka ndibei. Ndaamenyaga kũrĩa yoimĩte, o na gũtuĩka ndungata iria ciatahĩte maaĩ nĩciamenyaga. Hĩndĩ ĩyo agĩĩta mũhikania keheri-inĩ" 
John2:10 akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Mũndũ aambaga kũruta ndibei ĩrĩa njega, na ageni maarĩkia kũnyua mũno, agacooka akaruta ĩrĩa ĩtarĩ njega; no wee ũkũigĩte ĩrĩa njega nginya rĩu.”" 
John2:11 Kĩu nĩkĩo kĩama kĩa mbere kĩrĩa Jesũ aaringire, na aakĩringĩire kũu Kana ya Galili. Akĩonania riiri wake, nao arutwo ake makĩmwĩtĩkia." 
John2:12 Thuutha ũcio agĩikũrũka Kaperinaumu, marĩ na nyina, na ariũ a nyina, o na arutwo ake. Magĩikara kuo matukũ manini." 
John2:13 Rĩrĩa Bathaka ya Ayahudi yakuhĩrĩirie-rĩ, Jesũ akĩambata, agĩthiĩ Jerusalemu." 
John2:14 Kũu hekarũ-inĩ nĩakorire andũ makĩendia ngʼombe, na ngʼondu, na ndutura, o na angĩ maikarĩte metha-inĩ magĩceenjia mbeeca." 
John2:15 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio agĩthondeka mũcarica wa mĩkanda, na akĩmarutũrũra othe kuuma hekarũ-inĩ, hamwe na ngʼondu, na ngʼombe; akĩhurunja mbeeca cia arĩa maacenjagia mbeeca na akĩngʼaũrania metha ciao." 
John2:16 Nao arĩa meendagia ndutura akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Eheriai ici gũkũ! Mwahota atĩa gũtua nyũmba ya Baba ndũnyũ!”" 
John2:17 Nao arutwo ake makĩririkana nĩ kwandĩkĩtwo atĩrĩ, “Kĩyo kĩrĩa ndĩ nakĩo kĩa nyũmba yaku nĩkĩo gĩkaandĩa.”" 
John2:18 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Ayahudi makĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Nĩ kĩama kĩrĩkũ ũngĩtũringĩra gĩa gũtuonia ũhoti ũrĩa ũrĩ naguo wa gwĩka maũndũ macio mothe?”" 
John2:19 Nake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Thariai hekarũ ĩno, na nĩngũmĩaka rĩngĩ na mĩthenya ĩtatũ.”" 
John2:20 Nao Ayahudi magĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Hekarũ ĩno yakirwo na mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna na ĩtandatũ, nawe ũkũmĩaka na mĩthenya ĩtatũ?”" 
John2:21 No rĩrĩ, hekarũ ĩrĩa aaragia ũhoro wayo nĩ mwĩrĩ wake." 
John2:22 Na thuutha wake kũriũkio kuuma kũrĩ arĩa akuũ-rĩ, arutwo ake makĩririkana ũrĩa oigĩte. Nao magĩĩtĩkia Maandĩko, o na ciugo icio Jesũ aarĩtie." 
John2:23 Na rĩrĩ, hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aarĩ Jerusalemu hĩndĩ ya Gĩathĩ kĩa Bathaka, andũ aingĩ makĩona ciama iria aaringaga, nao magĩĩtĩkia rĩĩtwa rĩake." 
John2:24 No Jesũ ndaigana kũmeĩhokera, nĩgũkorwo nĩooĩ andũ othe." 
John2:25 Ndaabataragio nĩ ũira wa mũndũ, ũkoniĩ mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩ, nĩgũkorwo nĩamenyaga kĩrĩa kĩrĩ thĩinĩ wa mũndũ." 
John3:1 Na rĩrĩ, kwarĩ na mũndũ wa Afarisai wetagwo Nikodemo, warĩ wa kĩama kĩrĩa gĩathanaga kĩa Ayahudi." 
John3:2 Nĩokire kũrĩ Jesũ ũtukũ, akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Rabii, nĩtũũĩ we ũrĩ mũrutani uumĩte kũrĩ Ngai. Nĩgũkorwo gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩhota kũringa ciama iria ũringaga Ngai atarĩ hamwe nake.”" 
John3:3 Nake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ngũkwĩra atĩrĩ na ma, gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩona ũthamaki wa Ngai atangĩciarwo rĩngĩ.”" 
John3:4 Nake Nikodemo akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Mũndũ angĩciarwo atĩa arĩ mũkũrũ? Ti-itherũ ndangĩhota gũtoonya nda ya nyina hĩndĩ ya keerĩ nĩguo aciarwo!”" 
John3:5 Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Ngũkwĩra atĩrĩ na ma, gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩtoonya ũthamaki-inĩ wa Ngai atangĩciarwo na maaĩ na Roho." 
John3:6 Mwĩrĩ ũciaraga mwĩrĩ, no Roho aciaraga roho." 
John3:7 Ndũkagegio nĩ ũguo ndoiga atĩ, ‘No nginya ũciarwo rĩngĩ.’" 
John3:8 Rũhuho rũhurutanaga na kũrĩa rũngĩenda. Ũiguaga rũkĩhurutana, no ndũmenyaga kũrĩa rumĩte kana kũrĩa rũrorete. Ũguo noguo gũtariĩ harĩ mũndũ ũrĩa wothe ũciarĩtwo nĩ Roho.”" 
John3:9 Nake Nikodemo akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Ũndũ ũcio ũngĩhoteka atĩa?”" 
John3:10 Nake Jesũ akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Wee ũrĩ mũrutani wa Isiraeli na ndũrataũkĩrwo nĩ maũndũ maya?" 
John3:11 Ngũkwĩra atĩrĩ na ma, twaragia ũrĩa tũũĩ, na tũkoimbũra ũrĩa tuonete, no inyuĩ, mũtiĩtĩkagĩra ũira witũ." 
John3:12 Ndakwĩra maũndũ ma gũkũ thĩ, waga gwĩtĩkia; ũngĩtĩkia atĩa ingĩkwĩra maũndũ ma na igũrũ?" 
John3:13 Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũrĩ wathiĩ igũrũ tiga ũrĩa woimire igũrũ, na nĩwe Mũrũ wa Mũndũ.”" 
John3:14 Na o ta ũrĩa Musa aambararirie nyoka ya gĩcango werũ-inĩ, ũguo no taguo Mũrũ wa Mũndũ akaambarario," 
John3:15 nĩguo ũrĩa wothe ũmwĩhokete agĩe na muoyo wa tene na tene. 
John3:16 “Nĩgũkorwo Ngai nĩendire kĩrĩndĩ, akĩruta Mũrũ wake wa mũmwe, nĩgeetha mũndũ o wothe ũmwĩtĩkĩtie ndakoore, no agĩe na muoyo wa tene na tene." 
John3:17 Nĩgũkorwo Ngai ndaatũmire Mũrũwe gũkũ thĩ aciirithie kĩrĩndĩ, no nĩguo kĩrĩndĩ kĩhonoke nĩ ũndũ wake." 
John3:18 Ũrĩa wothe ũmwĩtĩkĩtie ti wa gũciirithio, no ũrĩa wothe ũtamwĩtĩkĩtie ũcio nĩarĩkĩtie gũtuĩrwo ciira, nĩgũkorwo ndehokete rĩĩtwa rĩa Mũrũ wa Ngai wa mũmwe." 
John3:19 Rĩĩrĩ nĩrĩo ituĩro: Ũtheri nĩwokire gũkũ thĩ, no andũ makĩenda nduma gũkĩra ũtheri, nĩ ũndũ ciĩko ciao ciarĩ njũru." 
John3:20 Mũndũ o wothe wĩkaga ũũru nĩathũire ũtheri, na ndangiumĩra ũtheri-inĩ nĩ gwĩtigĩra ciĩko ciake itikoimbũke." 
John3:21 No mũndũ ũrĩa wothe wĩkaga maũndũ ma ma nĩoimagĩra ũtheri-inĩ, nĩguo kuonekane kũna atĩ ũguo ekĩte nĩ Ngai ũmũhotithĩtie.”" 
John3:22 Thuutha wa ũguo, Jesũ na arutwo ake nĩmoimagarire magĩthiĩ bũrũri wa Judea, kũrĩa aikarangire nao, na akabatithanagia." 
John3:22 Thuutha wa ũguo, Jesũ na arutwo ake nĩmoimagarire magĩthiĩ bũrũri wa Judea, kũrĩa aikarangire nao, na akabatithanagia." 
John3:23 O nake Johana nĩabatithanagĩria Ainoni gũkuhĩ na Salimu, nĩgũkorwo kũu nĩ kwarĩ maaĩ maingĩ, nao andũ nĩmookaga kuo kaingĩ kaingĩ mabatithio." 
John3:24 (Hĩndĩ ĩyo Johana ndaakoretwo aikĩtio njeera.)
